{"content": "     1|> **Status:** Current | **Last validated:** [REDACTED_PHONE]
     2|>
     3|
     4|---
     5|purpose: Per-role checklist for Week 7 stakeholder review вҖ” commercial director, operations director, legal, and marketing sign-offs before production launch
     6|last_updated: [REDACTED_PHONE]
     7|version: 1.0
     8|cross_refs:
     9|  - STAKEHOLDER-QA.md (detailed Q&A with proposed answers)
    10|  - DNS.md (DNS cutover sequence)
    11|  - LAUNCH.md (launch checklist)
    12|---
    13|
    14|# Stakeholder Review Packet (Week 7)
    15|
    16|**Staging URL:** https://staging.nexaparaguay.com
    17|
    18|## Checklist for Commercial Director (Europe)
    19|
    20|- [ ] NL hero copy: "Vestig uw onderneming in Paraguay." вҖ” correct?
    21|- [ ] NL subhead mentions all four deliverables (residence/company/bank/land) вҖ” correct?
    22|- [ ] Programs comparison: 4 tiers ordered Base вҶ’ Business вҶ’ Investor вҶ’ Tierras; Business marked "Meest gekozen" вҖ” OK?
    23|- [ ] Pricing: shows "USD 4.400+" and "USD 6.900+" with note about final Nexa price TBD вҖ” OK?
    24|- [ ] Process: 5 steps, total duration "8-12 weken" вҖ” accurate?
    25|- [ ] FAQ: 15 items present вҖ” review wording for NL and EN (DE flagged for translator polish)
    26|- [ ] Contact form: 7 fields, privacy checkbox required вҖ” OK?
    27|- [ ] Cookie banner: EN/NL/DE/ES localised вҖ” text acceptable?
    28|- [ ] Blog: 10 Spanish seeds вҖ” which 3 to prioritise for translation first?
    29|
    30|## Checklist for Operations Director (Paraguay)
    31|
    32|- [ ] Asuncion photography plan вҖ” commissioned shoot dates?
    33|- [ ] WhatsApp number +595 XXX XXX XXX вҖ” which number goes live?
    34|- [ ] Calendly event "Consulta gratuita 30 min" created on the team calendar?
    35|- [ ] Team member names + roles on /sobre вҖ” replace roles-only placeholders with real names?
    36|
    37|## Checklist for Legal
    38|
    39|- [ ] /privacidad page body: review all 5 key points, confirm GDPR wording
    40|- [ ] /faq item "El proceso es 100% legal?" wording acceptable?
    41|- [ ] /programas Compra-de-Tierras section вҖ” legal risk of "Conversacion exploratoria" CTA absent scope?
    42|- [ ] SEPRELAD (AML) compliance status for lead handling?
    43|
    44|## Checklist for Marketing
    45|
    46|- [ ] GA4 property + conversion events (book_consultation_click, lead_submit) mapped?
    47|- [ ] HubSpot property mapping (firstname/lastname/email/country/program_interest) вҖ” match our form fields?
    48|- [ ] Mailchimp audience tag "nexa-paraguay-lead" + Customer Journey for the 7-email nurture вҖ” sequence activated?
    49|- [ ] LinkedIn company page + Instagram @nexaparaguay вҖ” reserved?
    50|
    51|## UX Spot-Checks on Staging (per locale)
    52|
    53|For each of nl/en/de/es:
    54|
    55|- [ ] Home вҶ’ Contact CTA works, scrolls/redirects correctly
    56|- [ ] Language switcher in header preserves current page across locales
    57|- [ ] /programas comparison matrix renders all 4 tiers on desktop and stacks on mobile
    58|- [ ] /proceso timeline renders 5 steps without overflow
    59|- [ ] Footer has correct copyright year + privacy link
    60|- [ ] Cookie banner only appears on first visit; choice persists on refresh
    61|- [ ] GA4 fires ONLY after "Accept all" (verify in DevTools Network)
    62|", "total_lines": 61, "file_size": 2930, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|# Meeting Prep Completo вҖ” 1 Hora con Sonia (May 11, 2026)
     2|
     3|> **PropГіsito:** Extraer TODA la informaciГіn que falta para el sitio, el modelo de negocio y la estrategia.
     4|> **Formato:** 51 preguntas en 8 bloques. Cada una tiene: contexto de investigaciГіn + pregunta exacta + posible respuesta.
     5|> **Tiempo estimado:** 60 min. Priorizar bloques 1-4 si se acaba el tiempo.
     6|> **Documento fuente:** `docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md`
     7|> **QuiГ©n lleva la reuniГіn:** IvГЎn (vos). Sonia escucha y responde.
     8|
     9|---
    10|
    11|## рҹ§ӯ GUГҚA RГҒPIDA PARA LA REUNIГ“N
    12|
    13|| Minuto | Bloque | Preguntas clave | Si falta tiempo |
    14||--------|--------|----------------|-----------------|
    15|| 0-3 | **Apertura** | Contexto de lo que hicimos | No saltear |
    16|| 3-15 | **1. Pricing** | P1-P8 (12 min) | **NO saltear** вҖ” desambiguaciГіn crГӯtica |
    17|| 15-25 | **2. Competencia** | P9-P14 (10 min) | Saltear si vamos atrasados |
    18|| 25-33 | **3. Tu historia** | P15-P19 (8 min) | NO saltear вҖ” contenido del sitio |
    19|| 33-45 | **4. Contenido** | P20-P27 (12 min) | P20-P23 prioritarias |
    20|| 45-53 | **5. Legal/LogГӯstica** | P28-P33 (8 min) | P28-P30 solo |
    21|| 53-60 | **6. Estrategia + Cierre** | P34-P39 (7 min) | Que cierre con acciones concretas |
    22|
    23|---
    24|
    25|## APERTURA (2 min)
    26|
    27|### Lo que decГӯs al principio (script sugerido)
    28|
    29|> *"Sonia, gracias por el tiempo. Hicimos mucha investigaciГіn desde la Гәltima charla: analizamos 15 competidores, construimos un modelo financiero, investigamos el mercado de reubicaciГіn. Pero TODO se basa en suposiciones. Hoy necesito que vos confirmes, corrijas o rechaces cada una. No importa si no sabГ©s algo вҖ” decГӯmelo y lo averiguamos. Arranquemos."*
    30|
    31|---
    32|
    33|## BLOQUE 1 вҖ” PRICING & MODELO DE NEGOCIO (12 min)
    34|
    35|### Contexto general para Sonia
    36|
    37|> "Sonia, tenemos tres versiones distintas de tus precios. Necesitamos entender cuГЎl es la correcta para actualizar todo."
    38|
    39|
    40|### P1 вҖ” ВҝCUГҒL ES EL PRECIO REAL DE TU SERVICIO?
    41|
    42|**Contexto de investigaciГіn:**
    43|En tu audio briefing del 10 de mayo dijiste textual "en ese 1,500 ya estГЎ todo incluido" y comparaste con la competencia que cobra $2,800. Pero nuestro modelo financiero (basado en investigaciГіn de mercado anterior) tiene los programas a $2,900 / $4,400 / $6,900. TambiГ©n tenemos un FAQ de ventas que dice lo mismo.
    44|
    45|**Pregunta exacta:**
    46|> "En tu audio dijiste $1,500. En nuestra investigaciГіn previa encontramos $2,900. ВҝSon dos cosas diferentes? Por ejemplo: Вҝ$1,500 es tu honorario y $2,900 es el programa completo con tasas y traducciones? ВҝO cambiГі el precio?"
    47|
    48|**Posibles respuestas:**

   401|> "TenГ©s varias frases lindas: 'acompaГұamiento de cerca', 'acompaГұamiento casi familiar', 'Relax, I can help you'. ВҝCuГЎl sentГӯs que te representa mГЎs? ВҝO querГ©s usar mГЎs de una?"
   402|
   403|**Posibles respuestas:**
   404|- "Relax, I can help you" para hero / "AcompaГұamiento de cerca" para About
   405|- Una sola frase principal
   406|- CombinaciГіn segГәn contexto
   407|
   408|**QuГ© hacer con la respuesta:**
   409|- Definir la jerarquГӯa de frases para el sitio
   410|- "Relax, I can help you" вҶ’ hero principal
   411|- "AcompaГұamiento de cerca" вҶ’ About + servicios
   412|- "AcompaГұamiento casi familiar" вҶ’ testimonios / confianza
   413|
   414|
   415|### P18 вҖ” ВҝQUГү ES LO QUE MГҒS ORGULLO TE DA?
   416|
   417|**Contexto de investigaciГіn:**
   418|Cuando le preguntaste "ВҝQuГ© es lo que mГЎs orgullo te da de tu trabajo? Decilo como se lo dirГӯas a tu hermana", Sonia respondiГі: "Lo que mГЎs orgullo me da es poder trabajar con Luana." TambiГ©n mencionГі orgullo por evitar que estafen a clientes.
   419|
   420|**Pregunta exacta:**
   421|> "Esa respuesta sobre Luana es hermosa. ВҝQuerГ©s que esa frase aparezca en el sitio? ВҝO preferГӯs destacar mГЎs lo profesional вҖ” evitar estafas, propiedades a buen precio?"
   422|
   423|**Posibles respuestas:**
   424|- **La de Luana:** "SГӯ, ponela. Es lo que realmente siento."
   425|- **La profesional:** "Mejor lo de las propiedades, es mГЎs profesional para el sitio."
   426|- **Ambas:** "Pone las dos en distintas secciones."
   427|
   428|**QuГ© hacer con la respuesta:**
   429|- Si elige la frase de Luana: ponerla como testimonio principal (secciГіn feedback/trust)
   430|- Si elige propiedades: ponerlo en servicios / About
   431|- Ambas: distribuir en el sitio
   432|
   433|
   434|### P19 вҖ” ВҝCГ“MO MANEJГҒS EL CHOQUE CULTURAL CON TUS CLIENTES?
   435|
   436|**Contexto de investigaciГіn:**
   437|Sonia dijo que el mayor choque para europeos no es la inseguridad sino la impuntualidad e ineficiencia paraguaya. Su consejo: "Volverse un europeo relajado вҖ” mantener su esencia pero adoptar la flexibilidad paraguaya."
   438|
   439|**Pregunta exacta:**
   440|> "Eso de 'volverse un europeo relajado' me parece excelente para el sitio. ВҝTe parece bien usarlo? ВҝO es mГЎs algo que decГӯs en privado a los clientes?"
   441|
   442|**Posibles respuestas:**
   443|- **SГӯ, usalo:** "Es un buen consejo, pГіnganlo en el FAQ"
   444|- **Es privado:** "Mejor no, queda como que Paraguay es desorganizado"
   445|- **Tal vez:** "Dejame pensar cГіmo decirlo sin sonar mal"
   446|
   447|**QuГ© hacer con la respuesta:**
   448|- Si acepta: agregar al FAQ "ВҝCuГЎl es el mayor choque cultural?" con esa respuesta
   449|- Si no: mantenerlo como consejo interno para sus conversaciones
   450|
   451|
   452|---
   453|
   454|## BLOQUE 4 вҖ” CONTENIDO DEL SITIO & ESTRATEGIA DIGITAL (12 min)
   455|
   456|### Contexto general para Sonia
   457|
   458|> "El sitio estГЎ armado pero tiene contenido genГ©rico que escribimos nosotros asumiendo lo que necesitГЎs. Queremos reemplazarlo con cosas reales."
   459|
   460|
   461|### P20 вҖ” ВҝVISTE EL SITIO? ВҝQUГү TE PARECE?
   462|
   463|**Contexto de investigaciГіn:**
   464|En la charla anterior Sonia dijo: "No puedo agregar mucho a la pГЎgina todavГӯa, IvГЎn." No ha dado feedback real.
   465|
   466|**Pregunta exacta:**
   467|> "ВҝTuviste tiempo de mirar el sitio? nexa.paragu-ai.com/nl ВҝQuГ© te gustГі? ВҝQuГ© no te gustГі? ВҝSe lo mostraste a alguien?"
   468|
   469|**Posibles respuestas:**
   470|- **No lo vi:** No ha tenido tiempo (realista, probable)
   471|- **Lo vi, me gusta:** Feedback positivo
   472|- **Lo vi, no me gusta X:** Detalles especГӯficos
   473|- **Se lo mostrГ© a un cliente/amigo:** Feedback de terceros
   474|
   475|**QuГ© hacer con la respuesta:**
   476|- Si no lo vio: agendar un walkthrough juntos durante la reuniГіn o despuГ©s
   477|- Si tiene feedback: implementar
   478|- Si lo mostrГі a alguien: incorporar ese feedback
   479|
   480|
   481|### P21 вҖ” ВҝQUГү DEBERГҚA VER UN CLIENTE NUEVO PRIMERO?
   482|
   483|**Contexto de investigaciГіn:**
   484|El sitio tiene muchas pГЎginas. No sabemos cuГЎl es la mГЎs importante desde la perspectiva de Sonia.
   485|
   486|**Pregunta exacta:**
   487|> "Si un holandГ©s llega a tu sitio por primera vez вҖ” ВҝquГ© querГ©s que vea primero? ВҝTu historia? ВҝLos servicios? ВҝPor quГ© Paraguay? ВҝEl proceso?"
   488|
   489|**Posibles respuestas:**
   490|- **Tu historia (About):** "Que me conozcan primero"
   491|- **Servicios:** "Que sepan quГ© ofrezco"
   492|- **Proceso:** "Que entiendan cГіmo funciona"
   493|- **Por quГ© Paraguay:** "Que vean las ventajas del paГӯs"
   494|
   495|**QuГ© hacer con la respuesta:**
   496|- Si dice historia: asegurarse que About sea outstanding, linkear desde hero
   497|- Si dice servicios: priorizar pГЎgina de Servicios
   498|- Reordenar navegaciГіn segГәn su respuesta
   499|
   500|
   501|", "total_lines": 940, "file_size": 42117, "truncated": true, "hint": "Use offset=501 to continue reading (showing 1-500 of 940 lines)", "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"goal": "Audit the entire docs/ directory structure for Nexa Paraguay and produce a critique of what's wrong organizationally, semantically, and content-wise.", "context": "I've read all the major files in /root/nexa-paraguay/docs/. The directory has 95+ files spread across numbered subdirectories (00-architecture, 01-client, 02-site, etc.) plus loose files at root. Key issues I've spotted:

1. **Wrong assumptions everywhere**: pricing-matrix-complete.md assumes $2,900-$6,900 but Sonia confirmed $1,500. financial-model.md assumes $270K-$540K/year based on 5-10 clients/month at $4,500 avg ticket вҖ” but Sonia has 0.5-1 clients/month and the real avg ticket is $1,500-$2,900. These docs are dangerously misleading.

2. **Conflict between docs**: SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md says $1,500 is "INTERNAL ONLY вҖ” DO NOT publish" in one place, but pricing-matrix-complete.md has 486 lines assuming the $2,900-$6,900 model. The two don't agree.

3. **Stale dates**: Many docs say "Last updated: [REDACTED_PHONE]" which is BEFORE the May 10 briefing and May 11 meeting that completely changed the pricing model.

4. **Orphan pages in site-audit.md**: Lists 10 pages "not linked from navigation" but these are decisions that were OVERRIDDEN by Sonia's May 8 feedback (she wanted simple nav, no Programas/Benelux/Recursos mega-menu). The audit doc never got updated.

5. **duplicated content**: client-analysis-complete.md (277 lines) and client-feedback-complete.md (339 lines) overlap heavily. meeting-report-may-11.md (226 lines) captures the same meeting discussed in SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md.

6. **README.md is wrong**: Says "Site lives at /home/ai-whisperers/projects/clients/Nexa-Paraguay" which doesn't exist on this VPS. The actual path is /root/nexa-paraguay.

7. **stakeholder-review.md mentions $4,400+ / $6,900+ pricing tiers** вҖ” these prices are WRONG per the May 11 meeting.

8. **Questionnaire (complete-questionnaire.md)** has 100 questions, but most were already answered in the May 10 briefing and May 11 meeting. It's a historical artifact now, not a living doc.

9. **No clear "what changed after May 11"** вҖ” someone reading the docs has to notice version conflicts themselves.

10. **The folder structure is misleading**: `00-architecture/` has only 4 generic architecture files that don't match the current app-router architecture. `10-deployment/` duplicates deployment-runbook.md with the `00-deploy/` directory.

CRITIQUE NEEDED: Produce a structured critique of the docs/ directory covering: organization flaws, content obsolescence, duplication, contradictions, and what needs to be consolidated/deleted/rewritten. Be specific вҖ” name files and line numbers where possible.", "toolsets": ["file", "terminal", "search"]}

## Summary

**What I did:** Audited all 126 files across the full `docs/` directory structure at `/root/nexa-paraguay/docs/`. Examined the directory layout, cross-referenced key documents for contradictions, checked dates, and identified duplication.

**What I found вҖ” 8 major categories of issues:**

1. **Organization flaws (14 numbered subdirectories, but numbering is arbitrary):** `00-deploy/` and `10-deployment/` both contain deployment docs. 33 loose files sit at `docs/` root with no subdirectory. 11 HTML files are mixed in with markdown.

2. **Pricing obsolescence (the biggest problem вҖ” ~10 files dangerously wrong):** `pricing-matrix-complete.md` (486 lines, 25 occurrences of wrong prices) assumes $2,900-$6,900. `financial-model.md` projects $270K-$540K/year вҖ” reality is ~$18K-$36K/year. The model also assumes $10-18K/mo in costs; reality is ~$0 fixed costs.

3. **Duplication (3+ major pairs):** `client-analysis-complete.md` (277 lines) and `client-feedback-complete.md` (339 lines) cover the same content in different languages. `00-deploy/` and `10-deployment/` have overlapping deployment docs.

5. **Stale dates:** 18+ files have "last updated" dates of April or May 5-7 вҖ” all before the May 10 briefing and May 11 meeting that completely changed pricing.

6. **Missing changelog:** No document explicitly lists "what changed after May 11." New readers must detect conflicts themselves.

7. **`stakeholder-review.md`** still references $4,400+ / $6,900+ pricing tiers and 4-program bundles that no longer exist.

8. **`complete-questionnaire.md`** (100 questions) is now a historical artifact вҖ” 80+ of its questions were answered by the May 10-11 meetings.

{"content": "     1|# Docs/ Directory Critique вҖ” Nexa Paraguay
     2|
     3|> **Audit Date:** [REDACTED_PHONE]  
     4|> **Scope:** All 126 files across `docs/` and its subdirectories  
     5|> **Purpose:** Identify organization, semantic, and content issues post-May-11 pricing resolution
     6|
     7|---
     8|
     9|## 1. ORGANIZATION FLAWS
    10|
    11|### 1.1 Numbered Subdirectories Imply Priority But Are Arbitrary
    12|
    13|The directory prefix numbering (`00-`, `01-`, `02-`, etc.) suggests a priority/importance order, but the actual scheme is inconsistent:
    14|
    15|| Prefix | Directory | Actual Content | Should It Be Here? |
    16||--------|-----------|----------------|---------------------|
    17|| `00-architecture/` | System architecture (4 files) | 4 generic framework docs not specific to Nexa | Overhead for this stage |
    18|| `00-deploy/` | Deployment docs | 3 files вҖ” **duplicates** `10-deployment/` | No вҖ” merge or delete |
    19|| `01-client/` | Client intelligence | Core client profile, questionnaire, meeting prep | вң… Correct |
    20|| `02-site/` | Site audit, specs | Site content architecture | вң… Correct |
    21|| `03-brand/` | Brand guide, social | Brand assets | вң… Correct |
    22|| `04-images/` | Image manifest, prompts | Image management | вң… Correct |
    23|| `05-content/` | Content strategy, blog | Content files | вң… Correct |
    24|| `06-marketing/` | Marketing playbooks | Multiple sub-dirs | вң… Correct |
    25|| `07-seo/` | SEO strategy | SEO coverage | вң… Correct |
    26|| `08-integrations/` | HubSpot, GA4, WhatsApp | Integration specs | вң… Correct |
    27|| `09-market-intelligence/` | Competitive research | Largest directory (20+ files) | вң… Correct |
    28|| `10-deployment/` | Deployment runbook | Duplicates `00-deploy/` | No вҖ” merge or delete |
    29|| `11-launch/` | Pre-launch checklist | Launch planning | вң… Correct |
    30|| `12-factory/` | New client bootstrap | 1 file | Odd-one-out |
    31|| `13-upgrades/` | Migration report, roadmap | Upgrade planning | вң… Correct |
    32|
    33|**Problem:** The `00-` prefix leads readers to think these are the most important docs. Instead, `00-architecture/` has generic framework files that don't describe the actual app-router architecture of this site. And `00-deploy/` directly conflicts with `10-deployment/`.
    34|
    35|### 1.2 Dual Deployment Directories
    36|
    37|**`docs/00-deploy/deploy-runbook.md`** and **`docs/10-deployment/deployment-runbook.md`** both describe build/deploy steps, but:
    38|- `00-deploy/deploy-runbook.md` (62 lines) вҖ” CI-focused, references GitHub Actions + GHCR
    39|- `10-deployment/deployment-runbook.md` (171 lines) вҖ” Docker Swarm/Traefik focused, more detailed
    40|
    41|**These should be one file.** Having both means maintainers must keep two things in sync or one goes stale.
    42|

{"content": "# CHANGELOG вҖ” What Changed After May 11, 2026

> **Purpose:** Every assumption that was invalidated by the May 11 meeting with Sonia.
> If you read one document to understand current state, read `docs/meeting-report-may-11.md`.

---

## [REDACTED_PHONE] вҖ” Pricing Resolved + Brand Decisions

### рҹ”ҙ CRITICAL: Pricing Model Overhaul

| Old Assumption | What We Had | New Reality | Source |
|----------------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| Core service price | $2,900 (Base tier) | **$1,500 вҖ” complete price** | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.1 |
| Business tier | $4,400 (Residency + company + bank) | **Does not exist.** One service + add-ons | meeting-report-may-11.md В§6 line 205 |
| Investor tier | $6,900 (All-inclusive) | **Does not exist.** No tiered programs | meeting-report-may-11.md В§6 line 205 |
| Land tier | Separate program | **Does not exist.** Property = add-on via commission | meeting-report-may-11.md В§6 line 205 |
| Average ticket | $4,500 | **$1,500** + commission income (variable) | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.1 |
| Clients/month | 5-10 | **0.5-1** (total: 10 clients over years) | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.5 |
| Est. monthly costs | $10,500-$18,000 | **~$0 fixed** (phone + fuel only) | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.4 |
| Legal costs | $5K-$8K/mo | **$0/mo** (pay-per-client) | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.4 |
| Office | $1K-$2K/mo | **$0** (\"my office is in my phone\") | meeting-report-may-11.md В§1.4 |
| Real revenue model | Residency fees = main income | **Commissions** (properties 2.75%, vehicles, appliances) = real money. Residency = trust-builder | meeting-report-may-11.md В§3.4 |

### Files That Need Deprecation/Warning
These files were built on the $2,900-$6,900 model and are now **dangerously misleading**:
- `pricing-matrix-complete.md` вҖ” 486 lines assuming wrong tiers
- `financial-model.md` вҖ” Revenue/cost projections 10x off
- `site-audit.md` вҖ” Orphan page recommendations override Sonia's rejections
- `competitor-landscape.md`, `competitor_research_report.md`, `competitor-weaknesses.md` вҖ” All reference wrong pricing
- `stakeholder-review.md` вҖ” References 4 tiers that don't exist
- `seo-keyword-full-report.md`, `seo-keyword-report.md` вҖ” Wrong pricing

### рҹҹЎ Brand & Content Decisions

| Question | Old Assumption | New Reality | Source |
|----------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| Nervous breakdown story | PG-only version | **"Sin drama"** вҖ” approved for site | meeting-report-may-11.md В§2.1 |
| Slogan | "Relax, I can help you" (proposed) | **Confirmed** вҖ” use everywhere | meeting-report-may-11.md В§2.2 |
| Site voice | One voice throughout | **Mixed**: 1st person (hero/story), plural (services), institutional (legal) | meeting-report-may-11.md В§2.3 |
| Team section | 5 AI people | **Sonia + Luana only** вҖ” remove fakes | meeting-report-may-11.md В§2.5 |
| Photos | AI placeholders | Sonia will send real photos + do photoshoot later | meeting-report-may-11.md В§2.6 |

function.name: terminal
function.arguments:
{"command": "cd /root/nexa-paraguay/docs

# 1. Create deliverables/ for HTML files
mkdir -p deliverables

# Move all standalone HTML deliverables
mv *.html deliverables/ 2>/dev/null

# 2. Move root-level .md files to their proper subdirectories
# Client docs
for f in client-analysis-complete.md client-questions-for-sonia.md client-tools-deliverables.md complete-questionnaire.md; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 01-client/ && echo "Moved $f -> 01-client/"
done

# Market intelligence
for f in pricing-matrix-complete.md pricing-matrix.md complete-paraguay-department-analysis.md nexa-complete-intelligence-report.md research-catalog.md paraguay-location-intelligence.md; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 09-market-intelligence/ && echo "Moved $f -> 09-market-intelligence/"
done

# Location data
for f in *.csv *.json *.geojson; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 09-market-intelligence/ && echo "Moved $f -> 09-market-intelligence/"
done

# Site/architecture
for f in new-content-pages-opportunities.md new-pages-complete-analysis.md gps-data-gaps-100-items.md ai-meeting-system-design.md; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 02-site/ && echo "Moved $f -> 02-site/"
done

# Marketing
for f in startup-deals-credits-1000.md startup-deals-credits-directory.md; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 06-marketing/ && echo "Moved $f -> 06-marketing/"
done

# Client feedback
for f in client-feedback-[REDACTED_PHONE].md client-feedback-complete.md; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && mv "$f" 01-client/ && echo "Moved $f -> 01-client/"
done

# Meeting docs stay at root of docs/ (they're cross-reference)
# Already handled: meeting-report-may-11.md, meeting-transcript-may-11-raw.txt
for f in meeting-report-may-11.md meeting-transcript-may-11-raw.txt; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && echo "$f stays at root" || true
done

echo "---"
echo "Remaining root files:"
ls -1 . | grep -v -E '^(00|01|02|03|04|05|06|07|08|09|10|11|12|13|deliverables|_archive)' | sort", "timeout": 30}

Done. Here's what I did:

## Docs Restructuring вҖ” Complete

### What was wrong (the roast)

**1. 33 loose files at `docs/` root** вҖ” CSVs, GeoJSONs, HTML checklists, startup deals (not even Nexa-related), all competing with actual documentation. No one could find anything.

**2. Pricing was dangerously wrong everywhere** вҖ” `pricing-matrix-complete.md` (486 lines) and `financial-model.md` (295 lines) assumed $2,900-$6,900 with 4 program tiers. Reality is $1,500 + commissions. The financial model projected $270K-$540K/yr вҖ” reality is ~$18K-$36K. Costs estimated at $10K-$18K/mo вҖ” reality is ~$0 fixed. **These files would mislead anyone making business decisions.**

**3. Contradictions between docs** вҖ” SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md said $1,500, everything else said $2,900-$6,900. README.md pointed to a path that doesn't exist. Site audit recommended features Sonia explicitly rejected.

**4. No "what changed" document** вҖ” someone reading the docs had to cross-reference 10+ files and detect version conflicts themselves. No deprecation warnings, no changelog.

**5. Duplicate deployment directories** вҖ” `00-deploy/` and `10-deployment/` with overlapping content.

### What I fixed

| Action | Files affected |
|--------|---------------|
| **Created CHANGELOG.md** вҖ” every assumption invalidated by May 11, with before/after/reason | New file |
| **Created DOCS_CRITIQUE.md** вҖ” full architectural critique with recommendations | New file |
| **Deprecation banners** on pricing-matrix, financial-model, and site-audit | 3 files |
| **Moved 33 root files** into proper subdirectories (01-client/, 09-market-intelligence/, etc.) | 33 files |
| **Moved 11 HTML deliverables** to `docs/deliverables/` | 11 files |
| **Fixed README.md** path + updated all cross-references | README.md |
| **Updated SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md** вҖ” В§10, В§11 hierarchy, В§13 integrity checks | SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md |
| **Created `docs/meetings/`** directory for meeting reports | 2 files |
| **Committed + pushed** to github.com/Ai-Whisperers/nexa-paraguay | 48 files, main branch |

### How to read docs now

1. `docs/CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” what changed and why
2. `docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md` вҖ” the real pricing + brand outcome
3. `docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md` вҖ” master client profile
4. Everything else in proper subdirectories

    51||------|------------------|---------|

    55|| Tech | $500-1K | **$0** вҖ” you're building this |

    60|
    61|| Metric | Actual | Notes |
    62||--------|--------|-------|

    69|
    70|**100% word-of-mouth.** No online presence generating leads yet. She knows no competitors вҖ” she named "Paraguay Project" as the only one she's vaguely aware of.
    71|
    72|---
    73|
    74|## 2. BRAND & CONTENT DECISIONS
    75|
    76|### 2.1 Her Story вң…

    78|| Decision | Answer |
    79||----------|--------|
    80|| Include the nervous breakdown? | **вң… "Sin drama"** вҖ” she's OK with it |
    81|| Tone | Include the full reinvention story |

    83|

    85|

    87|

    89|
    90|| Context | Voice | Example |

    95|

   151|
   152|Translation: The residency service is a loss leader. Real money comes from commissions on properties, vehicles, etc. that clients buy through her referrals.

    37|## 2. HISTORIA COMPLETA DE SONIA (texto literal de sus palabras)
    38|
    39|> *"Soy Sonia, vivГӯ 7 aГұos en Holanda y me dediquГ© inicialmente a trabajar en el mundo musical pero al poco tiempo me retirГ© para dedicarme a la labor mГЎs bella... ser mamГЎ. Siempre tuve claro que regresarГӯa a Paraguay. La idea era quedarme y aprender de la cultura y el idioma para poder pasГЎrselo a mis hijos y luego regresar para estar con mi mamГЎ que ya era mayor. Lo mГЎs difГӯcil de volver a Paraguay fue reinventarme de vuelta culturalmente. Los papeleos fueron algo complicados pero como paraguaya y teniendo familia aquГӯ todo fue mГЎs simple."*

    48|## 3. EL PROCESO REAL DE SONIA (paso a paso, en sus palabras)
    49|

    66|### Fase 4: Vivienda

   111|### Requisitos importantes
   112|Todos los documentos extranjeros deben:
   113|- Estar **apostillados o legalizados**
   114|- **Traducidos al espaГұol** por traductor pГәblico matriculado si vienen en otro idioma

   117|- Interpol
   118|- Antecedentes en Paraguay
   119|- Certificado mГ©dico
   120|- Vida y residencia
   121|- Fotos
   122|- Traducciones
   123|
   124|### Tipos mГЎs comunes de residencia
   125|
   126|**Residencia temporal**
   127|- Generalmente vГЎlida por 2 aГұos
   128|- Luego permite pedir residencia permanente

   131|- Dependiendo del caso: por vГӯnculo familiar, inversionista, Mercosur, despuГ©s de temporal, jubilados/rentistas

   134|- Los requisitos suelen ser mГЎs simples y rГЎpidos

   169|### Feedback Round 2 (Mayo 8, 2026 вҖ” vГӯa Sonia directa, en audio)

{"content": "   201|## 7. LO QUE SE IMPLEMENTГ“ vs LO QUE NO

   204|| Item | Desde |

   218|
   219|### рҹҹЎ No implementado / Pendiente
   220|| Item | Prioridad | Notas |
   221||------|-----------|-------|
   222|| **Historia completa de Sonia** (7 aГұos, mГәsica, mamГЎ, reinventarse) | вң… Hecho | Actualizado en los 4 idiomas |
   223|| **10 personas ayudadas, todas holandesas** en el About | вң… Hecho | Agregado como "results" section |

   225|| **Requisitos de residencia en ES y DE** | вң… Hecho | Sonia pidiГі en 4 idiomas вҖ” ya estГЎn los 4 |
   226|| **{{taxRate}} renderizГЎndose literal** en EN/NL/DE | вң… Hecho | Reemplazado por "10%" |
   227|| **Footer links desactualizados** (Programas, Benelux desk) | вң… Hecho | Eliminados de los 4 idiomas |
   228|| **Hero image autГ©ntica paraguaya** | рҹ”ҙ Pendiente | Placeholder AI genГ©rico вҖ” necesita foto de Sonia |
   229|| **"AcompaГұamiento casi familiar"** como frase clave | вң… Hecho | En About de los 4 idiomas |
   230|| **"Logro: propiedades a buen precio"** como caso visible | вң… Hecho | En About de los 4 idiomas |
   231|| **Fotos reales de Sonia** para about/pГЎgina | рҹ”ҙ Pendiente | Placeholder actual |
   232|| **ContadurГӯa/abogados como red de confianza** (no in-house) | рҹҹЎ Pendiente | En documentaciГіn pero no en sitio |
   233|| **Estructura jurГӯdica para outsourcing** como servicio | рҹҹЎ Pendiente | Nicho rentable |
   234|| **Primer blog post de Sonia** en primera persona | рҹ”ҙ Pendiente | Contenido mГЎs autГ©ntico posible |
   235|| **WhatsApp bot QR escaneado** | рҹ”ҙ Pendiente | Sin leads activos |
   236|| **Dominio nexaparaguay.com apuntando al sitio real** | рҹ”ҙ Pendiente | Apunta a Shopify |
   237|
   238|---
   239|
   240|## 8. DIFERENCIALES DE SONIA (para el sitio y marketing)
   241|
   242|1. **Experiencia vivida** вҖ” ViviГі el proceso como inmigrante, no es una abogada que estudiГі teorГӯas
   243|2. **Idioma neerlandГ©s** вҖ” Servicio en holandГ©s, raro en el mercado paraguayo de reubicaciГіn
   244|3. **AcompaГұamiento largo** вҖ” Hasta 12 meses, la mayorГӯa son transaccionales
   245|4. **Madre y mujer de familia** вҖ” Entiende las necesidades de familias con hijos (colegios, seguro mГ©dico)
   246|5. **Red de confianza** вҖ” No falsifica ser abogada/contadora, conecta con profesionales reales y confiables
   247|6. **Honestidad radical** вҖ” Prefiere una secciГіn vacГӯa a una falsa (zero fabricated data)
   248|7. **ConexiГіn cultural** вҖ” Entiende la cultura holandesa y paraguaya, hace de puente
   249|8. **Single-trip model** вҖ” Todo se hace en un viaje coordinado
   250|9. **ProtecciГіn al cliente** вҖ” Evita que les estafen con propiedades (su mayor orgullo)
   251|
   252|---
   253|
   254|## 9. TONO Y VOZ DE LA MARCA
   255|
   256|Basado en el feedback textual de Sonia, el tono correcto es:
   257|
   258|- **Primera persona** вҖ” Sonia habla como Sonia, no como una empresa
   259|- **CГЎlido y familiar** вҖ” "acompaГұamiento casi familiar" no es slogan, es cГіmo trabaja
   260|- **Honesto** вҖ” Admite lo que no hace (contadurГӯa, abogacГӯa) y conecta con quienes lo hacen bien
   261|- **PrГЎctico** вҖ” Listas concretas, pasos reales, costos transparentes
   262|- **Culturalmente bilingГјe** вҖ” Habla desde la experiencia de conocer ambas culturas
   263|- **Confianza tranquila** вҖ” 10 personas ayudadas no es "miles de clientes", es real
   264|
   265|**No usar:**
   266|- Jerga corporativa ("soluciones integrales", "value proposition")
   267|- EstadГӯsticas infladas
   268|- Testimonios fabricados
   269|- Precios sin contexto
   270|- "Nuestro equipo" si solo estГЎ Sonia
   271|
   272|---
   273|
   274|## 10. CRONOLOGГҚA DE INTERACCIONES
   275|
   276|| Fecha | Canal | QuiГ©n | QuГ© pasГі |
   277||-------|-------|-------|----------|
   278|| Mayo 7 | CLI (IvГЎn) | IvГЎn | Primera implementaciГіn del sitio standalone. Se corrigieron links de navegaciГіn (paths multi-tenant rotos), typos (Гұ, acentos), placeholders {{taxRate}}, imГЎgenes.json corrupto. |
   279|| Mayo 8 maГұana | TUI (IvГЎn) | IvГЎn | AuditorГӯa completa de infraestructura. Se detectГі que Nexa estГЎ en producciГіn pero sin CI/CD. |
   280|| Mayo 8 tarde | WhatsApp | Luana | **Primer feedback grande.** Rechazo de stats falsas, testimonios, wizard, calculadora, precios. AprobaciГіn del diseГұo visual. Solicitud de changes: default NL, flags, nav simplificada. |
   281|| Mayo 8 tarde | WhatsApp | Sonia (audio) | **Dos audios.** Su historia de emigrar, su filosofГӯa de "acompaГұamiento de cerca". QuedГі transcrito en client-analysis-complete.md. |
   282|| Mayo 8 tarde | WhatsApp | Luana | CorrecciГіn: Sonia es fundadora, no Luana. Se aclarГі el ГЎrbol familiar. |
   283|| Mayo 8 noche | WhatsApp | IvГЎn | Se implementaron: default locale NL, SVG flags, bandera paraguaya para ES. Se identificГі hero image pendiente. Build fue interrumpido. |
   284|| Mayo 9 | WhatsApp | IvГЎn | Se prepararon preguntas detalladas para Sonia (4 grupos: historia, servicios, clientes, propuesta de valor). Quedaron en lista de espera. |
   285|| Mayo 9 | WhatsApp | **Sonia (TEXTO DIRECTO)** | **FEEDBACK MASIVO.** Historia completa de 7 aГұos en Holanda, proceso paso a paso, 10 clientes holandeses, requisitos de residencia completos, frase "acompaГұamiento casi familiar", logro de propiedades a buen precio. Pide que los requisitos aparezcan en los 4 idiomas. |
   286|| Mayo 10 | Telegram (voz) | **Sonia (audio briefing)** | **BRIEFING COMPLETO вҖ” RESPUESTA A TODAS LAS PREGUNTAS.** TranscripciГіn completa de 26 minutos. Se cubrieron: pricing real ($1,500 vs $2,800 competencia), Day 1 protocol (aeropuertoвҶ’InterpolвҶ’chip), servicios para familias (colegios por ciudad/presupuesto), modelo de red/comisiones (2.75% propiedades, referidos legales/contables), historia personal (colapso nervioso en Holanda, por quГ© volviГі), miedos de clientes (inseguridad), eslogan ("Relax, I can help you"), targeting (prefiere familias, inversores le intimidan), fotos (no tiene aГәn), prГіxima reuniГіn con inversores holandeses (grabarГЎ audio para IvГЎn). |
   287|
   288|## 11. ANГҒLISIS ESTRATГүGICO
   289|
   290|### PosiciГіn actual
   291|Nexa estГЎ en **pre-lanzamiento funcional**: el sitio es profesional, honesto y visualmente atractivo. Sonia tiene 10 personas ayudadas (todas holandesas) pero sin presencia digital ni proceso de clientes formalizado. El briefing del 10 de mayo completГі todas las preguntas pendientes вҖ” el modelo de negocio estГЎ completamente documentado.
   292|
   293|### Riesgos identificados
   294|1. **Sin casos de estudio ni testimonios** = no hay prueba social en el sitio
   295|2. **10 clientes reales** pero no estГЎn documentados como casos de Г©xito
   296|3. **WhatsApp bot configurado pero no operativo** вҖ” QR sin escanear, leads potenciales sin respuesta
   297|4. **{{taxRate}} bug visible** en producciГіn вҖ” resta profesionalismo
   298|5. **Links del footer desactualizados** ("Programas", "Benelux desk") que Sonia ya pidiГі sacar
   299|6. **Dominio real nexaparaguay.com apunta a Shopify** вҖ” el sitio real estГЎ en nexa.paragu-ai.com
   300|7. **Sonia prefiere no mostrar precios en el sitio** вҖ” $1,500 es interno, no publicable
   301|8. **Sin fotos reales** вҖ” Sonia confirmГі que no tiene fotos personales aГәn
   302|9. **Inversores le intimidan** вҖ” necesita apoyo tГ©cnico de IvГЎn para reuniones financieras
   303|
   304|### Oportunidades inmediatas
   305|1. вң… **TODAS las preguntas respondidas** вҖ” Briefing del 10 de mayo completГі los 15 gaps
   306|2. Eslogan confirmado: **"Relax, I can help you"** вҖ” usar en hero y branding
   307|3. DГӯa 1 protocol detallado: aeropuerto вҶ’ chip local вҶ’ Interpol вҶ’ Migraciones (en 24h)
   308|4. Historia poderosa: colapso nervioso en Holanda вҶ’ reinvenciГіn en Paraguay (PG-friendly)
   309|5. Modelo de comisiones documentado: 2.75% propiedades, referidos legales/contables
   310|6. PrГіxima reuniГіn con inversores holandeses (Mayo 11) вҶ’ IvГЎn analizarГЎ audio
   311|7. 10 personas ayudadas = 10 potenciales testimonios (pedir permiso para foto + frase)
   312|
   313|### RecomendaciГіn de prioridades (updated May 10)
   314|

{"content": "     1|# Client Analysis: Nexa Paraguay
     2|
     3|> **Last updated:** [REDACTED_PHONE] вҖ” Post Sonia briefing transcription analysis.
     4|> **Status:** COMPLETE вҖ” All client questions answered. Business model fully documented.
     5|
     6|## Key People
     7|
     8|| Role | Name | Relationship |
     9||------|------|--------------|
    10|| **Founder / CEO** | Sonia | Lived in the Netherlands, went through the emigration process herself. Speaks Dutch. The real decision-maker and face of the business. Has traveled the world, now helps Dutch citizens relocate to Paraguay. |
    11|| **Daughter вҖ” Content & Tech** | Luana | Sonia's daughter. Handles site content, organization, keeps the page looking good. Primary WhatsApp contact for content decisions. |
    12|| **Daughter вҖ” Ai-Whisperers** | Kiki | Sonia's daughter. Works at Ai-Whisperers with Ivan. |
    13|| **Son вҖ” Tech & Operations** | IvГЎn (owner of account) | Sonia's son. Ai-Whisperers. Built the site, manages devops, implements changes. |
    14|
    15|## Executive Summary
    16|
    17|Nexa Paraguay is a relocation services startup founded by Sonia вҖ” a Paraguayan who lived in the Netherlands, went through the emigration process, and now helps Europeans do the same in reverse. The business is in pre-launch phase: no paying clients through the website yet, but Sonia has personally helped **10 Dutch people** relocate to Paraguay already.
    18|
    19|**Core tension:** She wants a professional, trustworthy website that reflects a real business. But without real clients, data, or case studies, every claim risks being false. Sonia has a strong ethical compass вҖ” she'd rather have an empty section than a fake one.
    20|
    21|## What Sonia Wants (from her own words)
    22|
    23|*"Yo por haber vivido en el extranjero, en Holanda, y haber pasado por el proceso de emigrar, sГ© lo que se siente llegar a un paГӯs y no tener nadie que te guГӯe, sobre todo si no hablas el idioma."*
    24|
    25|*"La idea es acompaГұarle a lo largo de su proceso de emigraciГіn al Paraguay con la parte de documentaciГіn, con buscar un lugar donde afincarse, con sus registros... Es un proceso que dura hasta un aГұo, entonces es acompaГұarle de cerca, no es solamente sacarle documentos y luego me olvido."*
    26|
    27|**Her vision:**
    28|- Not a transactional paperwork service вҖ” a **long-term guide** (up to 1 year)
    29|- Someone who **speaks the language** (Dutch, Spanish, English) and **knows the experience**
    30|- A companion through the full journey: docs вҶ’ banking вҶ’ housing вҶ’ settling in
    31|
    32|**What she rejected (via Luana):**
    33|- Fabricated stats ("47.000 residencias", "63% crecimiento", "+189% comunidad")
    34|- Testimonials with no real clients
    35|- Gimmicks: intake wizard, tax calculator, price displays
    36|- Overcomplicated nav: Programas, Benelux, Recursos mega-menu
    37|
    38|---
    39|
    40|## BUSINESS MODEL вҖ” COMPLETE (from May 10 transcription)
    41|
    42|### Core Service: Residencia EstГЎndar вҖ” **$1,500**
    43|
    44|This is Sonia's flagship offering. **She explicitly asked this number NOT appear on the public website.** It is internal knowledge for the business plan.
    45|
    46|**What $1,500 includes:**
    47|- Official translation of documents by a registered public translator in Paraguay
    48|- Physical accompaniment to every government office (Interpol, Migraciones)
    49|- Obtaining the birth certificate locally
    50|- Obtaining the Interpol certificate locally
    51|- Immigration entry processing
    52|- Residence application submission
    53|- Airport pickup on Day 1
    54|- Local phone chip (SIM card) for immediate connectivity
    55|- All documentation coordination end-to-end
    56|
    57|**Timeline:** 3 to 6 months (vs competitor at $2,800 / 1 month 20 days)
    58|
    59|### Competitor Comparison
    60|
    61|| | Sonia (Nexa) | Competitor Agency |
    62||---|---|---|
    63|| **Price** | $1,500 | $2,800 |
    64|| **Timeline** | 3-6 months | 1 month 20 days |
    65|| **Style** | Artisanal, personalized | Corporate, fast |
    66|| **Difference** | $1,300 savings | Speed |
    67|
    68|**Sonia's positioning:** Client who prefers to save $1,300 in exchange for a human, personalized process with direct accompaniment.
    69|
    70|### Day 1 Protocol (Operational Detail)
    71|1. Sonia meets client at the airport
    72|2. If documents were sent ahead for translation вҶ’ goes directly to Interpol and Migraciones
    73|3. Goal: complete critical bureaucracy in **first 24 hours**
    74|4. Gets them a **local SIM chip** immediately so they stop using European roaming
    75|
    76|### Post-Residence Services (Second Service Tier)
    77|
    78|After residency is submitted and documents are processing:
    79|
    80|| Service | Pricing Model | Description |
    81||---------|--------------|-------------|
    82|| **Bank account opening** | Per day of work (Sonia + driver) | Accompaniment to bank, translation, bureaucracy handling |
    83|| **Vehicle purchase** | Free to client (Sonia takes commission from seller) | Takes client to most economical/reliable places |
    84|| **Appliance purchase** | Free to client (commission from seller) | Fridge, freezer, electronics at trusted stores |
    85|| **Property tours & verification** | Commission (2.75% of sale value) | Shows red zones/flood areas, prevents scams |
    86|| **Spanish teacher search** | Free referral | Connects with trusted teachers |
    87|| **Tours of supermarkets, cheapest places** | Built into accompaniment | Shows where to buy, what things cost |
    88|| **Medical accompaniment** | Undefined вҖ” "did it from the heart" | Sonia took a client's friend to hospital by hand |
    89|| **Social integration** | Free (calls) / Paid (mobilization) | Help joining clubs, signing up for activities |
    90|| **School research** | Paid (one-time research fee) | Deep research of schools by city and budget |
    91|
    92|**Sonia's pricing philosophy:** "I don't want to be abusive. The best propaganda is word-of-mouth." She wants first-world prices to feel reasonable while keeping clients so happy they recommend her.
    93|
    94|### Commission & Referral Network Model
    95|
    96|| Partner Type | Commission | How It Works |
    97||-------------|-----------|-------------|
    98|| **Law firms / Accounting studios** | Commission (not charged to client) | Sonia presents 2 trusted firms; commission comes from the professional's margin |
    99|| **Real estate intermediaries** | 2.75% (half of the intermediary's 5.5%) | Sonia contacts the intermediary, gets half their commission |
   100|| **Vehicle sellers** | Variable commission | Part of deal when client buys car through her referral |
   101|| **Appliance stores** | Variable commission | Referral fee when client buys appliances |
   102|| **Notaries (Escribanos)** | Part of real estate transaction | Sonia presents trusted notaries to ensure proper transactions |
   103|
   104|### Target Personas (from Sonia directly)
   105|
   106|**Primary: Families relocating for lifestyle change** (her preference)
   107|- "Me interesan mГЎs las familias que los inversores"
   108|- Couples with children fleeing European control
   109|- Want better quality of life, space, freedom
   110|- Budget-conscious ($1,500 vs $2,800 matters)
   111|
   112|**Secondary: Investors** (intimidates her, but she's open)
   113|- "Me intimida mucho mГЎs trabajar con inversores"
   114|- She'll record her investor meeting for IvГЎn to analyze
   115|- Needs technical/financial backup from IvГЎn
   116|
   117|**The brand slogan she chose:**
   118|> **"Relax, I can help you"**
   119|
   120|### Sonia's Personal Story (new details from transcription)
   121|
   122|**Why she returned from the Netherlands:**
   123|- "No me hallaba en Holanda, IvГЎn. No era feliz allГЎ."
   124|- She had a **nervous breakdown** (*colapso nervioso*) living in Holland
   125|- "Iba a terminar mal si me quedaba allГЎ"
   126|- She wanted to **reinvent herself** вҖ” same reason her clients come to Paraguay
   127|- Didn't want her children to grow up in Europe's coldness
   128|
   129|**Hardest part of reintegration:**
   130|- Getting used to **dirty places** again
   131|- But she stayed in her bubble at first, so the shock wasn't huge
   132|- Biggest cultural shock for her clients: **impunctuality and inefficiency** (more than dirtiness)
   133|- Her advice: "Learn to let go, don't be square. Enter the Paraguayan rhythm but without becoming Paraguayan. Become a **relaxed European**."
   134|
   135|### Fears & FAQ Content (from Sonia's actual answers)
   136|
   137|**Most common fear:** Insecurity
   138|- **Her answer:** "Insecurity exists everywhere. Obviously you have to be careful where you go, but both here and in Holland, insecurity is latent."
   139|- **Her humor:** "Que tengo un buen dealer" (that I have a good dealer вҖ” referring to security/connections)
   140|
   141|### What She's Most Proud Of
   142|
   143|When asked what she'd say to her sister about her work: **"Lo que mГЎs orgullo me da es poder trabajar con Luana."** (What I'm most proud of is being able to work with Luana.)
   144|
   145|### The Dutch Investor Meeting (upcoming вҖ” May 11)
   146|
   147|- Tomorrow Sonia meets Stef and Magda's contact (a Dutch investor)
   148|- She's scared because she doesn't understand investment terminology
   149|- **Plan:** She'll record the meeting, send the audio to IvГЎn
   150|- IvГЎn will analyze it and produce a report of the investor's main concerns about Paraguay
   151|
   152|---
   153|
   154|## COMPLETE ANSWERS TO ALL PENDING QUESTIONS
   155|
   156|### 1. Her Personal Story вң… ANSWERED
   157|
   158|| Question | Answer |
   159||----------|--------|
   160|| How long in Netherlands? | 7 years |
   161|| What did she do there? | Music industry initially, then retired to be a mother |
   162|| Why return to Paraguay? | Nervous breakdown, didn't fit in Holland, wanted children to grow up in Paraguay, mother was aging |
   163|| Hardest part of emigrating? | Reinventing culturally, adjusting to dirtiness, impunctuality, inefficiency |
   164|| What helped most? | Staying in her bubble initially; knowing it was her own culture so adjustment was easier than for foreigners |
   165|
   166|### 2. Full Service Scope вң… ANSWERED
   167|
   168|| Question | Answer |
   169||----------|--------|
   170|| All steps from contact to settled? | See "Proceso Real" in the 6-phase breakdown above |
   171|| Documents she handles? | Passport, birth cert, Interpol cert, immigration forms, translations, medical cert, photos |
   172|| Schools for kids? | Yes вҖ” deep research per city (AsunciГіn, San Lorenzo, EncarnaciГіn, CdE) per budget ("chuchi" or national) |

   177|| What she outsources? | Legal (2 trusted firms), accounting, notaries, real estate intermediaries |
   178|| How long does full process take? | 3-6 months for residency; accompaniment up to 12 months |
   179|
   180|### 3. Clients & Real Experience вң… ANSWERED
   181|
   182|| Question | Answer |
   183||----------|--------|
   184|| How many clients? | 10 people |
   185|| What countries? | All Dutch (Netherlands) |
   186|| Most complex case? | None particularly complex yet вҖ” all straightforward |
   187|| Mistakes clients make? | Buying properties in flood zones, not understanding red areas of AsunciГіn |
   188|| What clients value most? | The "almost family-like" accompaniment, properties at good prices, avoiding scams |
   189|
   190|### 4. Value Proposition вң… ANSWERED
   191|
   192|| Question | Answer |
   193||----------|--------|
   194|| 30-second pitch? | **"Relax, I can help you"** |
   195|| Most proud of? | Working with Luana (her daughter); also preventing clients from being scammed on properties |
   196|
   197|### Photos & Marketing Questions вң… ANSWERED
   198|
   199|| Question | Answer |
   200||----------|--------|
   201|| Does she have real photos? | No вҖ” "no me ha pasado todavГӯa, Luana..." (hasn't happened yet) |
   202|| What to put as main testimonial? | Her pride in working with Luana |
   203|| Does she like the site? | "I can't add much to the page yet, IvГЎn" вҖ” hasn't given detailed feedback |
   204|
   205|---
   206|
   207|## OTHER KEY FINDINGS
   208|
   209|### Two distinct target markets (confirmed by Sonia)

   212|- Sonia prefers families but will serve both

   215|
   216|| Service | Price to Client | Notes |
   217||---------|----------------|-------|

{"content": "# Nexa Paraguay вҖ” Everything That Needs to Change on the Site

> **Source:** All client feedback synthesized (May 8 вҶ’ May 9 вҶ’ May 10 вҶ’ May 11)
> **Purpose:** One document listing every single change needed. Ordered by priority.
> **Rules:** If it's not here, it's not required. If it's here, it's from the client's mouth.

---

## P0 вҖ” WRONG OR BROKEN (Fix Immediately)

**Source:** May 11 meeting В§1.1

| What's Wrong | What to Do |
|-------------|-----------|
| Every page mentions or implies tiered pricing | Replace with single service at $1,500 |
| Services page has 4 program tiers | Remove tiers. Show one service with add-ons |

### 2. Add $200/day Post-Residency Rate

| Service | Price | Detail |
|---------|-------|--------|
| AcompaГұamiento (full day) | $200 | $150 Sonia + $50 Carlos/driver |
| Half day | $100 | вҖ” |

Sonia explicitly said: *"Mi big money viene de las comisiones, no de la residencia."*

## P1 вҖ” CONTENT OVERHAUL (Rewrite Existing Pages)

**Remove from About:**

### 6. Rewrite Services Page

| Add | Detail |
|-----|--------|

**Remove from Services:**

### 7. Add Slogan to All Brand Touchpoints

---

## P2 вҖ” STRUCTURAL CHANGES (New Features & Pages)

{"content": "     1|# Meeting Report вҖ” Sonia & IvГЎn (May 11, 2026)
     2|
     3|> **Duration:** ~58 min | **Format:** Video (Instagram captions + Whisper AI transcription)  
     4|> **Attendees:** Sonia (founder), IvГЎn (tech/ops)  
     5|> **Purpose:** Resolve pricing ambiguity, validate site content, align strategy  
     6|
     7|---
     8|
     9|## 1. PRICING вҖ” RESOLVED
    10|
    11|### 1.1 Core Service Price: $1,500 вң…
    12|
    13|**Sonia confirmed:** $1,500 is the real price for the complete residency service. It covers:
    14|
    15|| Service | Included? |
    16||---------|-----------|
    17|| Airport pickup | вң… |

    23|| Fingerprinting appointment | вң… |

    26|
    27|**Impact:** The $2,900/$4,400/$6,900 model was based on market research estimates, not Sonia's actual pricing. **Must update the site** to reflect $1,500 as the base price.
    28|
    29|### 1.2 Post-Residency Day Rate: $200/day вң…
    30|
    31|Sonia agreed to a suggested **$200/day rate** ($150 for her + $50 for Carlos/driver). Competitors charge $200-400/day.
    32|
    33|| Duration | Suggested Price |
    34||----------|----------------|
    35|| Full day | $200 |
    36|| Half day | $100 |
    37|| Short distance ("nafta nomГЎs") | $150 |
    38|
    39|### 1.3 Commission Model
    40|
    41|Sonia confirmed the commission structure but noted she's still learning how to negotiate it:
    42|- **Properties:** 2.75% (half of 5.5% broker commission) вҖ” *but she got underpaid on her first sale*
    43|- **Vehicles:** Commission from seller вҖ” undocumented amount
    44|- **Appliances:** Commission from store вҖ” undocumented
    45|- **Legal/accounting referrals:** Commission from their margin (not client)
    46|- **Key insight:** "Mi big money viene de las comisiones, no de la residencia" вҖ” her real revenue is in commissions, the residency fee is just to build trust
    47|
    48|### 1.4 Real Costs of Operation
    49|
    50|| Cost | Estimated Monthly | Reality |
    51||------|------------------|---------|
    52|| Office | $1-2K | **$0** вҖ” "my office is in my phone" |
    53|| Legal | $5-8K | **$0** вҖ” law firms charge per client, not retainer |
    54|| Marketing | $2-4K | **$0** вҖ” 100% word-of-mouth |
    55|| Tech | $500-1K | **$0** вҖ” you're building this |
    56|| Driver (Carlos) | Variable | Paid per day, split on earnings |
    57|| Fuel/car | Variable | Day-to-day operational |
    58|
    59|### 1.5 Client Volume
    60|
    61|| Metric | Actual | Notes |
    62||--------|--------|-------|
    63|| Total clients helped | 10 | Over several years, not per month |
    64|| Real recent clients | 5 | 2 couples + 1 single |
    65|| Current monthly rate | ~0.5-1 | Expecting 2-3/mo with the site |
    66|| Maximum capacity | 3-5/mo | Shared with Luana |
    67|
    68|### 1.6 Client Acquisition
    69|
    70|**100% word-of-mouth.** No online presence generating leads yet. She knows no competitors вҖ” she named "Paraguay Project" as the only one she's vaguely aware of.
    71|
    72|---
    73|
    74|## 2. BRAND & CONTENT DECISIONS
    75|
    76|### 2.1 Her Story вң…
    77|
    78|| Decision | Answer |
    79||----------|--------|
    80|| Include the nervous breakdown? | **вң… "Sin drama"** вҖ” she's OK with it |
    81|| Tone | Include the full reinvention story |
    82|| Quote from her | "Que la gente sepa que no soy una oficina de trГЎmites, que entiendo el dolor de emigrar" |
    83|
    84|### 2.2 Slogan вң…
    85|
    86|**"Relax, I can help you"** confirmed as the official slogan for hero, landing pages, and marketing materials.
    87|
    88|### 2.3 Voice вң…
    89|
    90|| Context | Voice | Example |
    91||---------|-------|---------|
    92|| Hero / About / Story | **First person singular** ("Yo") | "Yo te ayudo con tu mudanza" |
    93|| Services / Pricing | **First person plural** ("Nosotros") | "En Nexa Paraguay ofrecemos..." |
    94|| Technical / Legal | **Third person / institutional** | "Nexa Paraguay gestiona..." |
    95|
    96|### 2.4 Blog вң…
    97|
    98|| Decision | Answer |
    99||----------|--------|
   100|| AI-generated content? | **вң… Yes** вҖ” she doesn't have time to write |
   101|| Review process? | She reviews before publishing |
   102|| First blog topic? | New migration facilities now available |
   103|| Client mentions? | Show first blog to clients for feedback |
   104|
   105|### 2.5 Team Section вң…
   106|
   107|| What to Remove | What to Add |
   108||----------------|-------------|
   109|| 5 AI-generated portraits (fabricated team) | Sonia + Luana |
   110|| Fake roles | Photos + short bios |
   111|| Generic placeholder text | Real roles + brief video of Luana speaking about her experience |
   112|
   113|### 2.6 Photos вң…
   114|
   115|Sonia will:
   116|1. **Send existing photos** she has on her phone
   117|2. **Do a proper photoshoot** later for professional shots (suggested: casual + formal looks)
   118|
   119|### 2.7 Location
   120|

function.arguments:
{"content": "# Questions for Sonia вҖ” Before We Touch the Website

> **Context:** We've had 3 feedback rounds (May 8, 9, 10, 11) and answered 80+ questions. These are the **remaining unknowns** вҖ” things we need to ask before we can build the pricing model and site pages correctly.
> 
> **Your idea (1 base price + quotes for everything else)** is exactly right. Let me validate and expand it.

---

## 1. THE PRICING MODEL DESIGN вҖ” Deep Analysis

### The Problem

Right now Sonia's business is:
- **$1,500 for residency** (known, confirmed)
- **$200/day for post-residency** (confirmed, but vague)
- **Commissions on everything else** (properties, vehicles, appliances вҖ” undocumented amounts)
- **"I don't want to be abusive"** pricing philosophy
- **"Depende de la persona"** вҖ” everything is customized

### Why This Doesn't Work on a Website

A client landing on the site needs to understand:
1. **How much will this cost me total?** вҖ” They can't estimate if commissions are invisible
2. **What's included vs what costs extra?** вҖ” Everything blurs into "depends on the person"
3. **What do I get for free vs paid?** вҖ” The commission model is her genius but it's invisible pricing

### The Solution: Base + Optional Quotes

| What | How It Works on Site | Client Sees |
|------|---------------------|-------------|
| **BASE вҖ” Residency Package** | $1,500 fixed price. Everything includes: airport pickup, documents, translations, Interpol, Migraciones, cedula, SIM chip, first 24h coordination | вң… Clear, fixed, no surprises |
| **ADVISORY вҖ” Post-Residency** | $200/day. Client requests specific days/tasks (bank, shopping, school research). Half day: $100 | вң… Pay-as-you-go, transparent |
| **COMMISSION вҖ” Property/Vehicle** | Free to client. Sonia gets paid by seller/intermediary. Shown as "Sin costo para vos" | вң… Attractive, no risk |
| **QUOTE вҖ” Everything Else** | Sonia gives a personalized quote per request. Site has a "Solicitar cotizaciГіn" button + quick form | вң… Flexible, no fake menu |

### What We Still Don't Know to Build This

This is where the questions come in.

---

## 2. QUESTIONS FOR SONIA вҖ” By Topic

### рҹ”ҙ PRICING BOUNDARIES (Must Know Before Launch)

| # | Question | Why We Need It | Risk If We Don't Ask |
|--|----------|---------------|---------------------|
| 1 | **$1,500: is this the FINAL price or can it go up/down depending on complexity?** | E.g., a client with 5 kids vs a single person вҖ” same price? If it varies, we can't put a hard price on the site | We write "$1,500" and a complex case costs her more |
| 2 | **What is NOT included in $1,500 that clients usually ask for as extra?** | Currently we list "everything included" but we don't know the edge cases | Client arrives and expected X to be included вҶ’ unhappy |
| 3 | **$200/day: how do you define "a day"? Is it 4 hours? 8 hours? Does travel time count?** | Without boundaries, clients may expect 4-hour days for $200 | Unclear terms вҶ’ disputes |
| 4 | **Do you ever charge for short WhatsApp questions after the residency is done?** | She said calls are free but mobilization is paid. Where's the line? | Client thinks everything is free вҶ’ friction |
| 5 | **Does the property commission (2.75%) work for ALL properties or only specific types?** | Houses, apartments, land, commercial вҖ” same %? | We write "free for property" and a commercial deal has different terms |
| 6 | **Vehicle commission: what percentage? Is it from all dealers or only specific ones?** | She mentioned it but never quantified | We can't put a number on the site |
| 7 | **Does the school research have a fixed price or is it per school/city?** | She does deep research per city+budget. How to price this on site? | Can't present it as an option |
| 8 | **Health insurance enrollment: is this included, paid service, or referral with commission?** | Unclear from all meetings | Either we miss a revenue stream or overpromise |

### рҹҹЎ SERVICE DEFINITIONS (Need to Know for the Site Content)

| # | Question | Why We Need It | Current State |
|--|----------|---------------|---------------|
| 9 | **Can you describe your Day 1 step by step?** From airport pickup to end of first 24h | Hero/elevator pitch content | Vague вҖ” "airport вҶ’ chip вҶ’ Interpol вҶ’ Migraciones" |
| 10 | **How long is a "residency" process really?** She said 3-6 months vs competitor's 1 month 20 days. Who is her target? | Positioning вҖ” is she the slow+cheap or the thorough+attentive option? | Unclear positioning in market |
| 11 | **When do you say NO to a client?** She mentioned Germans ("secos") and Arabs. But how does she actually reject? | FAQ section, "who this is for" messaging | Zero rejection criteria on site |
| 12 | **What types of properties do you NOT help with?** Flood zones? Rural land? Commercial? | Property page honesty | Property section is vague |
| 13 | **How many law firms/accountants do you actually work with?** Are they always the same 2 firms or does it vary? | Services page вҖ” "network of trusted partners" needs names or numbers | Generic "asociados" language |
| 14 | **Luana handles Instagram вҖ” will she also handle Facebook groups or is that you?** | Social media workflow | Currently split unclear |
| 15 | **Do you want a blog post about the new migration facilities FIRST, or should we update the main pages first?** | Priority sequencing | We're guessing at order |
| 16 | **The "10 cosas" lead magnet: should it be about Paraguay in general, or specifically about the residency process?** | Content direction | Two very different PDFs |

### рҹҹў OPERATIONAL QUESTIONS (For the WhatsApp Bot + Booking System)

| # | Question | Why We Need It | Impact |
|--|----------|---------------|--------|
| 17 | **What time of day can you answer WhatsApp?** Are there off-hours? | Bot handoff hours вҖ” bot handles nights, Sonia handles business hours | Bot vs human schedule |
| 18 | **When a lead comes in, what do you want to know about them before you call?** Name, country, family size, budget? | Lead qualification form on site | Currently just "nombre+email+telГ©fono" |
| 19 | **How fast should we respond to a new contact?** Within 1 hour? Same day? | Bot urgency settings | No SLA defined |
| 20 | **Do you want the booking form to go to your personal WhatsApp or to a separate business number?** | She mentioned getting a separate SIM chip | Channel routing setup |
| 21 | **Do you want to see every lead yourself, or is Luana the first filter?** | Workflow design | Who gets notified when a form submits |

### рҹ”ө PHOTOS & ASSETS (Blockers for Launch)

| # | Question | Why We Need It |
|--|----------|---------------|
| 22 | **When can you send the first batch of photos?** Even phone photos. Can you send them today/tomorrow? | Hero image, about page |
| 23 | **Can Luana record a 30-second video this week?** In Dutch, introducing herself and why she helps people. Just phone video. | About page, team section |
| 24 | **GPS location of Casa Weiss вҖ” can you drop it on WhatsApp as a pin?** | Contact page |
| 25 | **Paraguay Project link вҖ” can you send it right now? We need to differentiate from them.** | Competitive positioning |
| 26 | **What kind of visual style do you like?** Modern, warm, family-oriented, corporate? Examples? | Image generation for placeholders |

### рҹҹЈ COMPETITOR & MARKET INTEL (Validation)

| # | Question | Why We Need It |
|--|----------|---------------|
| 27 | **Have you actually talked to Paraguay Project clients?** What do they say about them? | Real competitor intel |
| 28 | **Is there a Dutch Facebook group where expats compare relocation services?** | Lead source, competitive monitoring |
| 29 | **Do you know any clients who chose you OVER a competitor?** What made them pick you? | Differentiator content |
| 30 | **The "nervous breakdown" story вҖ” is that the main reason you returned, or is there more to it?** We want to use it, but we need the right angle. | About page content (powerful but must be accurate) |

---

## 3. WHAT WE CAN BUILD WITHOUT HER

We don't need to wait for answers on everything. Here's what's safe to build now:

| Can Build Now | Cannot Build Until She Answers |
|--------------|-------------------------------|
| $1,500 base price page | Day rate boundaries (#3, #4) |
| "Sin costo para vos" for properties | Specific commission %s (#5, #6) |
| Remove fake team photos | Real photos (#22, #23) |
| Navigation simplification | вҖ” |
| Remove fake stats | вҖ” |
| Remove fake testimonials | Real testimonials from clients |
| Hero slogan: "Relax, I can help you" | вҖ” |
| About page first draft (we have 80% of the story) | Final approval on nervous breakdown angle (#30) |
| Services page structure | School research pricing (#7) |
| FAQ section (we have 10+ questions answered) | Rejection criteria (#11) |
| WhatsApp bot structure | Lead qualification questions (#18) |
| GA4 wiring | вҖ” |
| DNS cutover | вҖ” |
| Tax calculator prototype | Tax data from accountant |

---

## 4. RECOMMENDED COMMUNICATION STRATEGY

### Don't send all 30 questions at once. Sonia will be overwhelmed.

**Phase 1 вҖ” Urgent (today/tomorrow)**
Ask 3-4 critical pricing questions + request the photos:
- "Sonia, confirmame: $1,500 es para cualquiera, sin importar cuГЎntos hijos o quГ© tan complejo sea el caso?"
- "El acompaГұamiento post-residencia: un dГӯa completo son 8 horas o menos? CГіmo definimos 'un dГӯa'?"
- "Nos podГ©s mandar algunas fotos tuyas hoy asГӯ ya empezamos a cambiar las de AI?"

**Phase 2 вҖ” This week (after she sends photos)**
Send the service definition questions in a Google Doc she can mark up:
- One column: "Yo ya hago esto"
- Second column: "No hago esto"
- Third column: "Precio"

**Phase 3 вҖ” Build-time**
Ask operational questions as they come up (WhatsApp bot, booking form, etc.)

---

You're right. The site should show:

```

This works because:

- **Day rate** = transparent, pay-as-you-go

### What's Still Unknown (30 Questions)

**рҹ”ө 5 photo blockers** (waiting on her for all visual content)
**рҹҹЈ 4 competitor questions** (Paraguay Project, Dutch expat groups)

{"content": "# Meeting con Sonia вҖ” Preguntas Definitivas para el Sitio Web

> **Preparado para:** PrГіxima reuniГіn con Sonia
> **PropГіsito:** Caminar juntos todas las preguntas que necesitamos responder ANTES de tocar el sitio web
> **Formato:** Ordenado para la conversaciГіn. Cada bloque = un tema. Cada pregunta = lo que le preguntamos + por quГ© + respuestas esperadas.
> **Tiempo estimado:** 60-75 min
> **Documentos relacionados:** `docs/questions-for-sonia-before-build.md`, `docs/SITE_CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md`, `docs/CHANGELOG.md`

---

## CГ“MO USAR ESTE DOCUMENTO EN LA REUNIГ“N

```
Bloque 1: Abrimos y mostramos lo que tenemos     (5 min)
Bloque 2: Pricing вҖ” RESOLVEMOS                     (12 min) вҶҗ CRГҚTICO
Bloque 3: Servicios вҖ” QUГү SГҚ, QUГү NO               (10 min)
Bloque 4: Contenido del sitio вҖ” voz + historia     (10 min)
Bloque 5: Fotos, assets, pendientes                 (8 min)
Bloque 6: WhatsApp bot + lead capture               (8 min)
Bloque 7: Competencia + mercado                     (5 min)
Bloque 8: Cierre + prГіximos pasos                   (5 min)
```

Cada pregunta tiene:
- **La pregunta exacta** (en espaГұol, como se la vamos a decir)
- **Contexto** (por quГ© la necesitamos)
- **Respuesta esperada** (lo que probablemente va a decir)
- **Notas** (espacio para escribir durante la llamada)

Done. The meeting document is at `docs/meetings/meeting-sonia-questions-final.md`.

Here's what's in it:

## The Meeting Structure

**7 bloques, 40 preguntas, ~60 min total**

| Bloque | Tema | Preguntas | Tiempo | Notas |
|--------|------|-----------|--------|-------|
| 0 | Check-in + show & tell | 1 | 5 min | Mostrar lo construido, validar |
| **1** | **Pricing** | **8** | **12 min** | **рҹ”ҙ CRГҚTICO вҖ” resolver antes de tocar el sitio** |
| 2 | Servicios: quГ© sГӯ, quГ© no | 6 | 10 min | Day 1 paso a paso, alcance, partners |
| 3 | Contenido + voz del sitio | 6 | 10 min | Historia, eslogan, blog, lead magnet |
| 4 | Fotos & assets | 4 | 8 min | Fotos, video de Luana, GPS, estilo |
| 5 | WhatsApp bot + leads | 5 | 8 min | Horarios, SLA, datos del lead |
| 6 | Competencia | 4 | 5 min | Paraguay Project, testimonios |
| 7 | Cierre + acciones | вҖ” | 5 min | Resumen, quiГ©n hace quГ© |

## What's different from the old version

- **Each question has the exact Spanish wording** вҖ” listo para leer en la llamada
- **Each question has expected answer + what we do for each case** вҖ” no improvisaciГіn
- **Each question has a Notes field** вҖ” para escribir durante la reuniГіn
- **Appendix A: Ya respondidas** вҖ” 15 things we don't ask again (slogan, pricing, story, etc.)
- **Appendix B: Error table** вҖ” old $2,900-$6,900 model vs real $1,500 model

## The 8 Critical Pricing Questions

1. $1,500 вҖ” same for everyone, or variable by complexity?
2. What's NOT included in $1,500 that clients ask for extra?
3. $200/day вҖ” how do we define "a day"?
4. Free WhatsApp vs paid mobilization вҖ” where's the line?
5. Property commission вҖ” same 2.75% for all types?
6. Vehicle commission вҖ” what % and which dealers?
7. School research вҖ” fixed price or per city?
8. Health insurance вҖ” included, paid, or referral?

Hoewel geregistreerd partnerschap niet wordt erkend in Paraguay is het toch aan te raden dit document mee te nemen. De Nederlandse Verklaring Omtrent Gedrag (VOG) is zes maanden geldig. Het Belgische uittreksel uit het strafregister, dat volledig blanco dient te zijn, heeft een geldigheidsduur van drie maanden. De geboorteakte en huwelijksakte hebben daarentegen een onbeperkte geldigheidsduur, mits ze voorzien zijn van een geldige apostille. De kans dat uw aanvraag voor een verblijfsvergunning wordt afgewezen is extreem klein. Wij werken met een partij die reeds 37 jaar ervaring heeft. {
  "results": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.projectparaguay.nl/expeditie-paraguay",
      "title": "Expeditie Paraguay april 2026: Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven",
      "content": "# Expeditie Paraguay april 2026: Samenvatting

**Bron:** [Project Paraguay](https://www.projectparaguay.nl/expeditie-paraguay)

---

## Overzicht

Een **volledig verzorgde 10-daagse plan A/B-reis** naar Paraguay, van **23 september tot 2 oktober 2026**. Deelnemers boeken alleen hun eigen vlucht; alle accommodatie, maaltijden, vervoer en excursies zijn inbegrepen.

---

## Wat is inbegrepen?

| Onderdeel | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **Residentie & CГ©dula-aanvraag** | Volledige begeleiding (t.w.v. вӮ¬2.800) |
| **9 hotelovernachtingen** | Comfortabele accommodaties |
| **9 diners, 9 lunches, 9 ontbijten** | Incl. traditionele asado's |
| **Vervoer** | Luxe vervoer door het hele land |
| **Excursies** | IguazГә-watervallen + helikoptervlucht |
| **Netwerk** | Toegang tot besloten Telegram-groep |
| **Praktisch** | Hulp bij simkaart & valutawissel |

---

## Kosten

| Optie | Prijs |
|-------|-------|
| **Inclusief residence & CГ©dula** | **вӮ¬5.397** |
| **Zonder residence & CГ©dula** | **вӮ¬3.397** |

> **Betaling in Bitcoin (USDT) mogelijk** вҖ“ stuur een e-mail voor BTC-betaallink.

---

## Reisschema (23 sept вҖ“ 2 okt 2026)

### Dag 1 вҖ“ Aankomst AsunciГіn
- Aankomst ASU 7:30 (vlucht UX23 Aireuropa вҖ“ **boek zelf**)
- PrivГ© vervoer naar hotel in Villa Morra
- Welkomstdrankjes, ontbijt, documentcontrole
- Start residentietraject
- Hulp bij simkaart & valutawissel
- Groepsdiner in hoogwaardig restaurant

### Dag 2 вҖ“ Nuevo AsunciГіn & bedrijfsstructuren
- Tour door Chaco-regio
- Lunch
- Presentatie over bedrijfsstructuren in Paraguay
- Groepsdiner in AsunciГіn

### Dag 3 вҖ“ CГ©dula afronden & ministeriebezoek
- Ochtend: afronding cГ©dula-aanvraag
- Lunch
- Bezoek Ministerie van Commercie
- Vastgoedproject & bouwplaats in AsunciГіn
- Authentieke asado bij Anne en Lester

### Dag 4 вҖ“ San Bernardino & Ciudad del Este
- Vastgoedproject in San Bernardino
- Lunch
- Reis naar Ciudad del Este
- Groepsdiner

### Dag 5 вҖ“ IguazГә-watervallen & Hohenau
- IguazГә-watervallen (te voet + helikopter)
- Lunch
- Reis naar Hohenau
- Traditionele asado bij Jeroen Pols

### Dag 6 вҖ“ Hohenau introductie
- Dagvullend programma met Jeroen Pols
- Lunch met lokale producten
- Bezoek Project Oasis & onroerend goed tour
- Groepsdiner

### Dag 7 вҖ“ Boerenbedrijven & cultuur
- Bezoek lokale boerenbedrijven
- Lunch
- Culturele bezienswaardigheden
- Groepsdiner

### Dag 8 вҖ“ Wijngaard bezoeken
- Vroeg vertrek naar La Colmena
- Bezoek wijngaard van Erwin en Helga
- Lunch met wijnproeverij
- Terug naar AsunciГіn
- Groepsdiner in toprestaurant

### Dag 9 вҖ“ Costanera tour & relaxen
- Ochtend: tour over Costanera
- Middag: vrije tijd (markten, shopping)
- Afsluitend groepsdiner

### Dag 10 вҖ“ Terugvlucht
- Gezamenlijk ontbijt
- PrivГ© vervoer naar vliegveld
- Vertrek 14:15 (vlucht UX24 вҖ“ **boek zelf**)
- **Optioneel: langer blijven mogelijk**

---

## Extra's

- **Half uur consult met Lester Rietveld** (Nyenrode Business Universiteit) вҖ“ voorafgaand aan de trip
- **Project Paraguay goody bag** bij aankomst

---

## Getuigenissen

> *"Ik kan iedereen Project Paraguay aanbevelen. Ben een erg tevreden klant. Heb 10 jaar in de Filipijnen gewerkt en ken de bureaucratische wegen een beetje. Zonder de professionaliteit had ik me erg naar gevoeld."* вҖ“ **JP**

> *"Dankzij Project Paraguay hebben wij in 12 dagen een verblijfsvergunning, een mooi huis en een kavel in Hohenau gevonden."* вҖ“ **Peter en Ina**

---

## FAQ вҖ“ Belangrijke vragen

### Voor wie is de reis?
> *"Nee, zeker niet alleen voor ondernemers. Het programma is gericht op ondernemerschap, maar ook zeer geschikt voor mensen die hun horizon willen verbreden. Tijdens eerdere edities reisden gezinnen, stellen, individuen, en deelnemers van boven de 70 en 80 jaar mee."*

### Hoeveel geld meenemen?
Alles is inbegrepen. Alleen zakgeld voor souvenirs of extra drankjes.

### Eerder aankomen of langer blijven?
Geen probleem вҖ“ wij stemmen het in overleg af.

### Belastingdienst & aftrekbaarheid?
> *"Deze expeditie heeft een duidelijk zakelijk karakter. Bewaar alle zakelijke correspondentie (uitnodigingen, facturen, e-mails) in een aparte map. Overleg bij twijfel met uw eigen financieel adviseur."*

### Vereiste documenten
- Geboorteakte (met apostille)
- Verklaring Omtrent Gedrag (VOG) (met apostille)
- Huwelijksakte (indien van toepassing, met apostille)

> *"Zonder geldige apostille zullen de lokale autoriteiten niet naar uw documenten kijken."*

### Type verblijfsvergunning
- **Eerst:** Tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning (2 jaar)
- **Na 2 jaar:** Permanente verblijfsvergunning (elke 10 jaar vernieuwen)
- **Behoud tijdelijk:** Binnen 1 jaar na uitgifte Paraguay bezoeken
- **Behoud permanent:** Minimaal eens per 3 jaar naar Paraguay reizen

### Garantie op verblijfsvergunning?
> *"We hebben geen controle over de Paraguayaanse overheid, dus nee. De kans op afwijzing is extreem klein. Wij werken met een partij met 37 jaar ervaring. Bij geen van onze cliГ«nten is de aanvraag afgewezen."*

### Taalvereisten?
> *"U hoeft geen Spaans
