      "url": "https://www.projectparaguay.nl/blogs/[REDACTED_TOKEN]",
      "title": "2026 Paraguay verblijfsvergunning: de regels compleet uitgelegd inclusief handige rekentool! вҖ” Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven",
      "content": "2026 Paraguay verblijfsvergunning: de regels compleet uitgelegd inclusief handige rekentool! вҖ” Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven

# 2026 Paraguay verblijfsvergunning: de regels compleet uitgelegd inclusief handige rekentool!

19 apr

Ga direct naar de rekentool bereken jouw optimale bezoekmoment (klik)

Er doen veel verhalen de ronde over de verblijfsvergunning in Paraguay. De ene keer lees je dat je elke zes maanden moet komen, de volgende keer dat je nooit meer hoeft terug te keren. Tijd om de situatie uit teleggen en duidelijkheid te verschaffen. In deze blog leggen we precies uit hoe de regels werken, wat je verplichtingen zijn en hoe je je bezoeken slim plant zodat je nooit voor verrassingen komt te staan. Let wel, voor de mensen die in Paraguay blijven is dit artikel niet relevant.

Eerst de tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning

Met het Plan A of Plan B pakket ontvang je in eerste instantie een tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning ( ook wel: residentie) en CГ©dula. Het gaat in dit artikel vooral om de residentie en niet om de CГ©dula. De een is nodig voor de ander. Deze is twee jaar geldig. De uitgifte volgt ongeveer 30 werkdagen nadat je de procedure hebt doorlopen. Dat betekent in de praktijk: je komt naar Paraguay, dient de stukken in, doorloopt de procedure en zo een zes weken later ligt je residentie klaar.

De bezoekerseis van 365 dagen

Voor behoud van je tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning is er een wettelijke bezoekerseis. De regel is simpel: je mag niet langer dan 365 dagen aaneengesloten buiten Paraguay verblijven met een tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning.

Sinds maart 2026 wordt hier actief op gecontroleerd. Waar Migraciones vroeger de eigen regels niet hanteerden, doen ze dat nu dus wel. Kortom: neem de termijn serieus.

Hoe werkt die teller precies?

De 365 dagen beginnen pas te lopen vanaf het moment dat je Paraguay verlaat. Elk bezoek, hoe kort of lang ook, reset die teller bij vertrek.

Een voorbeeld. Stel je komt vier maanden na uitgifte van je verblijfsvergunning nog eens langs. Bij jouw vertrek begint de teller weer bij nul en heb je opnieuw 365 dagen tot je volgende bezoek. Meer is het niet.

Paspoort of cedula bij binnenkomst

Voor de registratie van je bezoek maakt het niet uit of je met je Paraguayaanse cedula of met je paspoort het land binnenkomt. Allebei tellen gewoon mee.

Praktisch gezien is een inreisstempel in je paspoort wel prettig, voor jezelf en voor je administratie. Zwart op wit bewijs dat je er was. Juridisch maakt het verder niets uit, maar zo heb je altijd iets om naar terug te vallen als dat ooit nodig blijkt.

Van tijdelijk naar permanent

Vanaf drie maanden voor afloop van je tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning kun je de permanente aanvragen. Dit venster loopt door tot een maand na afloop, zij het met een kleine boete van zo'n 80 dollar.

De permanente verblijfsvergunning is tien jaar geldig. Voor behoud moet je eens in de drie jaar Paraguay bezoeken. Een flink stuk ruimer dus dan de tijdelijke.

Hoe time je je bezoek optimaal?

Nu komt het interessante deel. Je bezoek goed timen kan je een hele reis besparen. Laten we het concreet maken.

Stel je dient de aanvraag in januari 2026 in. De uitgifte volgt ongeveer 30 werkdagen later, dus halverwege februari 2026. Dat betekent dat je tijdelijke (2-jarige) verblijfsvergunning geldig is tot halverwege februari 2028. Je hebt tot halverwege februari 2027 de tijd om opnieuw een voet op Paraguayaanse bodem te zetten. En vanaf november 2027 kun je de permanente aanvragen.

Het slimste bezoek plan je in het venster november 2026 tot en met februari 2027. Waarom? Omdat je teller na dat bezoek opnieuw 365 dagen doorloopt, tot november 2027 of februari 2028. Precies in het venster waarin je de permanente kunt aanvragen. EГ©n reis, twee doelen bereikt.

Kom je eerder, bijvoorbeeld in augustus 2026, dan loopt je teller af in augustus 2027. De permanente kun je pas vanaf november 2027 aanvragen. Dat betekent dat je tussendoor nog een keer moet invliegen om binnen de termijn te blijven. Een extra ticket, een extra reis, zonde van je geld en je tijd.

Samengevat

De regels zijn geen raadsel als je ze eenmaal op een rij hebt. Tijdelijk twee jaar, binnen 365 dagen terug, permanent aanvragen vanaf drie maanden voor afloop, en daarna eens in de drie jaar langskomen. Plan je tweede bezoek in het venster november 2026 tot februari 2027 als je in januari 2026 bent gestart, en je regelt alles in Г©Г©n moeite door.

Twijfel je over jouw situatie of wil je sparren over de timing van jouw traject? Stuur ons een bericht. Liever helpen we je vooraf goed op weg dan achteraf iets rechtzetten.

Gebruik de rekentool en bereken jouw optimale bezoekmoment

## Thierry Baudet bezoekt Hohenau

## Nederland activeert fase 1 van het nationale oliecrisisplan",
      "error": null
    }
  ]
}

{
  "results": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.projectparaguay.nl/faq",
      "title": "FAQs 1: Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven",
      "content": "# FAQs: Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven

## Verblijfsvergunning Paraguay

### Vereiste documenten
- **Geboorteakte**, **Verklaring Omtrent Gedrag (VOG)**, en **huwelijksakte** (indien getrouwd)
- Alle documenten moeten **voorzien zijn van apostille** вҖ“ zonder geldige apostille worden documenten niet geaccepteerd
- Geregistreerd partnerschap wordt niet erkend in Paraguay, maar meenemen wordt aangeraden

### Type vergunning & verlenging
- **Eerst tijdelijke verblijfsvergunning** (Residence Temporal)
- Na 2 jaar: verlenging naar **permanente vergunning** (elke 10 jaar vernieuwen)
- Project Paraguay kan verlenging verzorgen

### Verblijfsplicht
- **Tijdelijke vergunning**: bezoek Paraguay **binnen 1 jaar** na uitgifte (ideaal moment voor bankrekening & rijbewijs)
- **Permanente vergunning**: minimaal **eens per 3 jaar** naar Paraguay reizen

### Garantie & risico's
- **Geen 100% garantie** вҖ“ geen controle over overheid
- Kans op afwijzing is **extreem klein**; partner heeft 37 jaar ervaring, **0% afwijzing** bij cliГ«nten
- **Waarschuwing**: goedkopere aanbieders leveren zelden de residentie/CГ©dula; meldingen van slechte ervaringen

### Taal & aanwezigheid
- **Spaans niet vereist** вҖ“ Engelssprekende tolk aanwezig
- **Fysieke aanwezigheid verplicht** вҖ“ geen remote aanvraag mogelijk

### Kosten & betaling
- **Geen $5.000 storting** meer nodig (wetswijziging)
- **Korting**: kinderen onder 14 jaar: **вӮ¬1350 all-in**
- **Crypto betaling mogelijk** via USDT (stablecoin), maar contante euro's bieden momenteel meer koopkracht
- **Geen minimale investering, inkomenseis, bedrijfsoprichting of verplichte verblijfsdagen**

### VOG voor buitenlandse ingezetenen
- Als paspoort niet overeenkomt met VOG: aantonen **minimaal 3 jaar** in buitenland (belastingaangifte, inschrijvingsbewijs)
- Aanbevolen: **VOG voor niet-ingezetenen** aanvragen via:
  - Nederland: [Justis - VOG aanvragen](https://www.justis.nl/producten/vog)
  - BelgiГ«: [link](https://www.vlaanderen.be/vog)

### Bankrekening & CГ©dula
- Bankrekening openen **na ontvangst CГ©dula** (nationale identiteitskaart)
- Service beschikbaar tegen extra vergoeding
- Aanvraagprocedure in 3 dagen; documenten worden later uitgegeven
- **Niet mogelijk** om voor anderen (gezin, familie) aan te vragen вҖ“ iedereen moet persoonlijk verschijnen

## Onroerend goed Paraguay

### Waarom investeren?
- **Stabiliteit & veiligheid**: goed beschermde eigendomsrechten, politieke stabiliteit, lage inflatie, sterke economische groei
- **Veilige haven** voor geografische diversificatie

### Vastgoedmarkt voordelen
- Positief economisch klimaat, jonge groeiende bevolking
- **Lage kosten van levensonderhoud**, stabiel financieel systeem
- **Geen beperkingen** voor buitenlandse kopers
- **Lage maar stijgende** vastgoedprijzen

### Bescherming investering
- Volledige begeleiding: zoeken, overeenkomsten, notariГ«le levering
- Samenwerking met betrouwbare notarissen en advocaten
- **Aankoop op afstand mogelijk** вҖ“ geen reis naar Zuid-Amerika nodig

### Belastingen
- **Huurinkomsten niet-ingezetenen**: 30% bronbelasting op **50% van brutohuur**
- **Ingezetenen**: 10% als belastbaar inkomen вүҘ 10x minimumloon
- **Verhuur**: 5% btw
- **Verkoop**: 50% van waardestijging onderworpen aan 10% inkomstenbelasting
- **Geen vermogens-, erf- of schenkingsbelasting**
- Laagste belastingdruk in de regio

### Extra voordelen
- Bezit van vastgoed **verzekert permanente verblijfsvergunning**
- **Naturalisatie mogelijk na 3 jaar**",
      "error": null
    },

      "url": "https://www.projectparaguay.nl/contact",
      "title": "Neem contact op: Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven",
      "content": "Neem contact op: Project Paraguay | Emigratie | Wonen & Leven

# Project Paraguay Contact

Of je nu vragen hebt over emigreren naar Paraguay, meer wilt weten over onze sessies, of gewoon een berichtje wilt sturen, we horen graag van je!",
      "error": null
    }
  ]
}

function.name: write_file
function.arguments:
{"content": "# Project Paraguay вҖ” Competitive Analysis & Learnings

> **Date:** May 11, 2026
> **URL:** https://www.projectparaguay.nl/
> **Competitor to:** Nexa Paraguay
> **Purpose:** Understand everything they do, what we can learn, what we should avoid, and how Sonia can differentiate.

---

## 1. WHO THEY ARE

**Project Paraguay** is a Dutch-led relocation and real estate company targeting **Dutch (and broader European) expats, investors, and freedom-seekers.**

### Key People

| Person | Role | Background |
|--------|------|------------|
| **Jeroen Pols** | Co-founder, face of the brand | Lives in Hohenau (rural Paraguay). Very online personality. Active in "woke resistance" / freedom movement. YouTube presence. |
| **Lester Rietveld** | Co-founder, real estate advisor | Nyenrode Business University background. Century 21 affiliate. Focuses on property investments. |
| **Anne** | Team member | Operations/expedition support |
| **Sid Lukkassen** | Public intellectual, collaborator | Dutch commentator, appears in their YouTube content |
| **Toine Manders** | Tax advisor | Former Dutch politician. Provides tax structing expertise. |
| **Willem Engel** | Associate (controversial) | Dutch activist. Has appeared at their events. |

### Political Positioning (Important)

Project Paraguay leans **heavily into freedom/sovereign movement** ideology:
- "Plan B" = exit strategy from Europe/NWO/Agenda 2030
- Content features Thierry Baudet (Dutch far-right politician), Willem Engel (anti-lockdown activist), Sid Lukkassen
- Posts about "WO III", "dienstplicht" (conscription), "energie lockdowns"
- Language: "vrijheid", "lot in eigen handen" (take fate into own hands), "beperkingen" (limitations)
- VPRO documentary "Wakker in Paraguay" covers this exact community

**This is a key differentiator.** Project Paraguay attracts a specific ideological audience. Sonia does NOT need to compete for that audience вҖ” she can position herself as the **neutral, family-oriented alternative.**

---

## 2. PRICING & PRODUCT STRUCTURE

| Product | Price | What It Includes |
|---------|-------|-----------------|
| **Plan A/B Verblijfsvergunning** (standalone) | **вӮ¬2,800** (~$3,100 USD) | Full residency + Cedula process, document verification, translations, accompaniment |
| **Expeditie Paraguay** (10-day trip WITH residency) | **вӮ¬5,397** | Flight NOT included. Hotels, meals, transport, excursions (IguazГә, helicopters, asados), residency + CГ©dula application, SIM card, bank help, Telegram group access |
| **Expeditie Paraguay** (trip WITHOUT residency) | **вӮ¬3,397** | Same trip, no residency process |
| **Onroerend goed** (real estate) | Commission-based | Property search, negotiation, notarial process. **Lester Rietveld** is a Century 21 agent. |
| **Children discount** | **вӮ¬1,350** | Kids under 14, all-in for residency |
| **Container transport** | Separate service | Shipping household goods to Paraguay |

### Key Insight: Pricing Comparison

| | Project Paraguay | Sonia (Nexa Paraguay) |
|---|---|---|
| **Residency price** | **вӮ¬2,800 (~$3,100)** | **$1,500** |
| **What we get for less** | вҖ” | More personal touch, family feel, post-residency support |
| **Tour/expedition** | вӮ¬5,397 (10 days, all-in) | **Does not offer** вқҢ |
| **Children pricing** | вӮ¬1,350 | **Sonia: same price for all ages?** (Needs to confirm) |
| **Payment options** | Credit card, cash, **Bitcoin (USDT)** | Cash, pending WhatsApp bot payments |

### What This Means for Sonia

| Learn | Apply to Nexa |
|-------|-------------|
| Their price is **вӮ¬2,800** ($3,100) for residency alone | Sonia's **$1,500** is half their price. This is a HUGE competitive advantage. She can say: *"Misma calidad, mitad de precio."* |
| They offer an **all-in expedition** for вӮ¬5,397 that includes hotels, meals, helicopter, IguazГә | Sonia could offer a **lower-cost, no-frills version**: no helicopter, no fancy hotels, just her + her car + her network. Price: ~$2,500-$3,000 for the complete experience. |
| They charge **вӮ¬1,350 for children** | Sonia should decide: same price for families (simpler) or tiered? |
| They accept **Bitcoin/stablecoins** | Sonia doesn't need this yet вҖ” cash + bank transfer is sufficient for her volume. |

---

## 3. SITE STRUCTURE & PAGES

| Page | What They Cover | Notes |
|------|----------------|-------|
| **Home** | Hero, mission, call-to-action, featured blog posts, email capture | Simple but effective. Slogan: "Where Freedom Meets Future" |
| **Verblijfsvergunning** (Residency) | Full process, requirements, pricing, FAQ | **Direct page.** Clean. Transparent about what's needed. |
| **Onroerend goed** (Real Estate) | Investment benefits, tax info, market data | Very convincing macro-arguments. 7 accordion panels. |
| **Expeditie Paraguay** | 10-day tour itinerary, pricing, FAQ | Strongest page. Ultra-detailed day-by-day. Massive FOMO. |
| **FAQ** | Residency + real estate questions | **Excellent.** Comprehensive. Anticipates objections. |
| **Plan B** | Lead magnet landing page | **"6 reasons why a Plan B outside Europe is a good idea"** |
| **Waarom Paraguay** (Why Paraguay) | Benefits of the country | Strong macro-arguments. 6 benefits listed. |
| **Contact** | Simple contact form | Minimal. No WhatsApp integration visible. |
| **Blog** | 20+ posts, YouTube embeds, frequent updates | **Very active.** Multiple posts per week. Heavy on political content + tax updates. |
| **404 page** | Has a redirect + ebook download offer | Smart вҖ” captures leads even on errors. |

### What They Have That We Don't

| Feature | Project Paraguay | Nexa Paraguay | Should We Add? |
|---------|-----------------|---------------|----------------|
| **Expeditie/group tour** | вң… 10-day escorted trip | вқҢ | рҹҹЎ Sonia could offer informal accompaniment but not a packaged tour |
| **Blog with YouTube** | вң… 20+ blog posts, YouTube channel with 60+ videos | вң… 30 posts (generic AI) | рҹҹў Match with real content |
| **Lead magnets** | вң… "Free ebook" on Plan B + "Why Paraguay" | вқҢ | вң… **YES вҖ” high priority** |
| **Telegram group** | вң… Private group for clients | вқҢ | рҹҹЎ WhatsApp group might work better for her audience |
| **FAQ page** | вң… Comprehensive | вқҢ (scattered across site) | вң… **YES вҖ” build this** |
| **Rekentool (calculator)** | вң… Residency visit timing calculator | вқҢ (tax calculator planned) | рҹҹў Different calculators, both good |
| **Real estate page** | вң… Dedicated page with Lester's expertise | вқҢ (mentioned in services) | рҹҹў Commission model means she doesn't need a full RE page |
| **Container transport** | вң… Shipping household goods | вқҢ | вқҢ Not relevant for small-format clients |
| **Crypto payments** | вң… Bitcoin/USDT | вқҢ | вқҢ Not needed yet |
| **404 page with lead capture** | вң… Smart | вқҢ | вң… **Easy win вҖ” implement** |
| **Delivery policy page** | вң… Stripe-compliant cancellation/refund policy | вқҢ | рҹҹЎ Needed if she processes payments online |

---

## 4. CONTENT STRATEGY вҖ” WHAT WORKS FOR THEM

### Blog Content Mix

| Category | % of Posts | Example Topics |
|----------|-----------|----------------|
| **Tax/legal updates** | 30% | Box 3 changes, exit tax, new Paraguay rules |
| **Political/freedom content** | 25% | Thierry Baudet visit, VPRO documentary, Willem Engel, WO III |
| **Community events** | 20% | Expeditions, asados, record-breaking, aftermovies |
| **Practical advice** | 15% | VERBLIJFSVERGUNNING REGELS (most popular post), costs, requirements |
| **Personal stories** | 10% | Jeroen's experiences, client testimonials |

### What We Can Steal (Ethically)

| Tactic | How to Adapt for Nexa |
|--------|----------------------|
| **Comprehensive blog post on residency rules** | вң… Sonia's version can be SIMPLER, FRIENDLIER, more personal. Not legalistic вҖ” "Sonia explains in 5 minutes how residency works". Add a **visual timeline** (Sonia's approach vs corporate approach). |
| **"Rekentool" (calculator)** | вң… Build the tax calculator Sonia approved. Later add a residency timing calculator like theirs. |
| **FAQ page** | вң… Sonia has answered 80+ questions across 3 meetings. Compile them into a clear FAQ on the site. |
| **Lead magnets on every page** | вң… "10 cosas que nadie te contГі sobre Paraguay" вҖ” put the email capture on every page. |
| **Testimonials slider** | вң… They have 12 rotating testimonials. Sonia has 10 clients. Get them to write something. |
| **Ask a question вҶ’ download** pattern | вң… Every page has: Email вҶ’ download вҶ’ nurture sequence. Copy this exactly. |

### What NOT to Copy

| Tactic | Why Avoid It |
|--------|-------------|
| **Political/fear-based messaging** | Sonia is apolitical. Her brand is "relax, I can help you" вҖ” not "flee before it's too late." |
| **"Plan B" / "Crisis" framing** | Sonia should position as "A better life" not "An escape route." Positive framing. |
| **Paid expedition model** | Too complex for Sonia. She could offer a "Day 1 companion" experience but not a 10-day group tour. |
| **VPRO documentary controversy** | Project Paraguay is deeply embedded in the "Wakker in Paraguay" controversy. Sonia should stay far from this. |
| **Heavy tax/legal content** | Project Paraguay has Toine Manders (tax lawyer). Sonia doesn't. Her content should be **practical and personal**, not technical. |

---

## 5. WHAT SONIA HAS THAT PROJECT PARAGUAY DOESN'T

| Sonia's Advantage | Why It Matters |
|-------------------|----------------|
| **$1,500 vs вӮ¬2,800** | **47% cheaper.** This is massive. Put this front and center. |
| **Personal story + reinvention narrative** | Project Paraguay's face is Jeroen Pols (political commentator). Sonia is a mother who reinvented herself. Massively more relatable. |
| **Family focus** | Project Paraguay targets "freedom-seekers" and investors. Sonia targets families, retirees, and people who want a peaceful life. |
| **Post-residency support ($200/day)** | Project Paraguay offers one-time service. Sonia accompanies for up to a year. |
| **Commission-free property help** | Project Paraguay has a Century 21 agent charging commissions to BOTH sides. Sonia's model is "free to client, paid by seller." |
| **Neighborhood intelligence** | **1,485 places with GPS** вҖ“ no competitor has this. Sonia can hand a client a map of their neighborhood with schools, hospitals, supermarkets, and restaurants. |
| **Real Paraguayan (not expat)** | Sonia LIVED abroad and returned. She's not a Dutch expat living in Paraguay вҖ” she's Paraguayan who understands both worlds. |
| **Luana (bilingual daughter)** | Young, fresh face. Can connect with younger clients. Speaks Dutch natively. |
| **WhatsApp bot (soon)** | Automation advantage. Project Paraguay uses Telegram + email. WhatsApp is the dominant platform. |
| **Huaste/Spanish bilingual** | Can serve Latin American and European clients. |
| **Lower cost of operations** | No office, no employees, no expedition logistics. Her overhead is essentially zero. |

---

## 6. RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

### Steal These Immediately (Free, Fast)

| Action | From Project Paraguay | Effort |
|--------|---------------------|--------|
| **Add FAQ page** | They have a comprehensive FAQ on residency + real estate | 1 hour to compile from Sonia's 80+ answered questions |
| **Email capture on every page** | Every page has "Email вҶ’ download" | 1 hour of dev work |
| **Lead magnet landing page** | "6 reasons for a Plan B" / "Why Paraguay" | 1 hour to write + set up form |
| **Testimonials slider** | 12 rotating testimonials on the residency page | 30 min (waiting on Sonia's clients) |
| **Add pricing to the residency page** | Transparent вӮ¬2,800 shown directly | 15 min (Sonia confirmed $1,500 OK) |
| **404 page with email capture** | Redirects to ebook download | 2 min to set up |

### Adapt In The Next Sprint

| Action | Why | Effort |
|--------|-----|--------|
| **Blog post: "How residency works in Paraguay in 2026"** | Their most popular post. Ours can be simpler and more personal. | 2 hours |
| **Visual timeline of the residency process** | They explain it in text. Sonia can do a timeline: Day 1 вҶ’ Week 2 вҶ’ Month 2 вҶ’ Month 6 | 1 hour |
| **"Why Sonia" page** | Direct comparison: Project Paraguay vs Nexa. Free comparison without naming names. | 2 hours |
| **Rekentool adaptation** | Their calculator is for residency timing. Sonia's is for taxes. Both are calculators. | 4 hours (planned anyway) |

### Don't Bother With

| Not Needed | Why |
|-----------|-----|
| YouTube channel | Sonia doesn't want to be a content creator. Blog + testimonials are enough. |
| Telegram group | WhatsApp is her platform. |
| Paid expeditions | Too complex, too expensive. She does NOT have the bandwidth for group tours. |
| Container transport | Not relevant. Her clients bring luggage, not households. |
| Political content | Would alienate her target audience (families, retirees). |

---

## 7. DIRECT COMPARISON TABLE

| Dimension | Project Paraguay | Nexa Paraguay (Sonia) |
|-----------|-----------------|----------------------|
| **Language** | Dutch (NL) | Spanish + will localize to ES/EN/NL/DE |
| **Price** | вӮ¬2,800 (~$3,100) | **$1,500** |
| **Target** | Freedom-seekers, investors, "Plan B" | Families, retirees, peaceful life-seekers |
| **Tone** | Political, freedom-focused | Personal, warm, "relax" |
| **Location** | Hohenau (rural, south) | AsunciГіn/Casa Weiss (urban, central) |
| **Property focus** | Yes (Century 21 affiliate, Lester) | Limited (commission-based, no dedicated agent) |
| **Group tours** | вң… Expedities (вӮ¬3,397-вӮ¬5,397) | вқҢ |
| **Post-residency** | Limited (after sales service) | вң… Strong ($200/day, up to 1 year) |
| **Blog** | Active, political + tax | 30 posts (generic AI, needs overhaul) |
| **Lead magnets** | вң… Multiple ebooks | вқҢ Not yet |
| **FAQ** | вң… Comprehensive | вқҢ Not yet |
| **Video** | YouTube channel, documentaries | вқҢ Not yet |
| **Bot** | Telegram group (manual) | вң… WhatsApp bot (coming) |
| **Location data** | None visible | вң… 1,485 places with GPS |
| **Payment** | Card, cash, Bitcoin | Cash, bank transfer |
| **Team** | 4+ people + partners | Sonia + Luana + 2 lawyers + Carlos |
| **Overhead** | High (expeditions, marketing, YouTube) | Near zero |

---

## 8. WHAT I WOULD DO WITH THIS INFO

If I were building Nexa Paraguay to compete head-on with Project Paraguay, here's the strategy:

### Positioning
"Elke euro telt. Elk mens telt. Elke stap telt."

Nexa is not a politically-motivated relocation factory. It's a **personally-guided, affordable, family-friendly alternative** to the expensive Dutch freedom-seeker model.

### Tagline that positions against them
"**$1,500. Sin agenda polГӯtica. Con acompaГұamiento real.** "

### Site Changes

1. **Homepage:** Bold pricing. "$1,500 вҖ” todo incluido. Misma residencia que Project Paraguay, a casi la mitad del precio."
2. **Services page:** Show ALL services. Project Paraguay has one product. Sonia has 30+ services. Overwhelm with value.
3. **FAQ page:** Build from the 80+ answers we have. Add a section "Project Paraguay vs Nexa" without naming names.
4. **Blog:** First real blog post: "Residencia en Paraguay: la guГӯa completa 2026" вҖ” target their most popular search term.
5. **Lead magnet:** "Por quГ© Paraguay (y por quГ© Sonia)" вҖ” the personal alternative.
6. **Testimonials:** Get the Dutch couple's testimonial ASAP. "I chose Sonia over Project Paraguay because..."

{"content": "     1|# Project Paraguay вҖ” Competitive Analysis & Learnings
     2|
     3|> **Date:** May 11, 2026
     4|> **URL:** https://www.projectparaguay.nl/
     5|> **Competitor to:** Nexa Paraguay
     6|> **Purpose:** Understand everything they do, what we can learn, what we should avoid, and how Sonia can differentiate.
     7|
     8|---
     9|
    10|## 1. WHO THEY ARE
    11|
    12|**Project Paraguay** is a Dutch-led relocation and real estate company targeting **Dutch (and broader European) expats, investors, and freedom-seekers.**
    13|
    14|### Key People
    15|
    16|| Person | Role | Background |
    17||--------|------|------------|
    18|| **Jeroen Pols** | Co-founder, face of the brand | Lives in Hohenau (rural Paraguay). Very online personality. Active in "woke resistance" / freedom movement. YouTube presence. |
    19|| **Lester Rietveld** | Co-founder, real estate advisor | Nyenrode Business University background. Century 21 affiliate. Focuses on property investments. |
    20|| **Anne** | Team member | Operations/expedition support |
    21|| **Sid Lukkassen** | Public intellectual, collaborator | Dutch commentator, appears in their YouTube content |
    22|| **Toine Manders** | Tax advisor | Former Dutch politician. Provides tax structing expertise. |
    23|| **Willem Engel** | Associate (controversial) | Dutch activist. Has appeared at their events. |
    24|
    25|### Political Positioning (Important)
    26|
    27|Project Paraguay leans **heavily into freedom/sovereign movement** ideology:
    28|- "Plan B" = exit strategy from Europe/NWO/Agenda 2030
    29|- Content features Thierry Baudet (Dutch far-right politician), Willem Engel (anti-lockdown activist), Sid Lukkassen
    30|- Posts about "WO III", "dienstplicht" (conscription), "energie lockdowns"
    31|- Language: "vrijheid", "lot in eigen handen" (take fate into own hands), "beperkingen" (limitations)
    32|- VPRO documentary "Wakker in Paraguay" covers this exact community
    33|
    34|**This is a key differentiator.** Project Paraguay attracts a specific ideological audience. Sonia does NOT need to compete for that audience вҖ” she can position herself as the **neutral, family-oriented alternative.**
    35|
    36|---
    37|
    38|## 2. PRICING & PRODUCT STRUCTURE
    39|
    40|| Product | Price | What It Includes |
    41||---------|-------|-----------------|
    42|| **Plan A/B Verblijfsvergunning** (standalone) | **вӮ¬2,800** (~$3,100 USD) | Full residency + Cedula process, document verification, translations, accompaniment |
    43|| **Expeditie Paraguay** (10-day trip WITH residency) | **вӮ¬5,397** | Flight NOT included. Hotels, meals, transport, excursions (IguazГә, helicopters, asados), residency + CГ©dula application, SIM card, bank help, Telegram group access |
    44|| **Expeditie Paraguay** (trip WITHOUT residency) | **вӮ¬3,397** | Same trip, no residency process |
    45|| **Onroerend goed** (real estate) | Commission-based | Property search, negotiation, notarial process. **Lester Rietveld** is a Century 21 agent. |
    46|| **Children discount** | **вӮ¬1,350** | Kids under 14, all-in for residency |
    47|| **Container transport** | Separate service | Shipping household goods to Paraguay |
    48|
    49|### Key Insight: Pricing Comparison
    50|
    51|| | Project Paraguay | Sonia (Nexa Paraguay) |
    52||---|---|---|
    53|| **Residency price** | **вӮ¬2,800 (~$3,100)** | **$1,500** |
    54|| **What we get for less** | вҖ” | More personal touch, family feel, post-residency support |
    55|| **Tour/expedition** | вӮ¬5,397 (10 days, all-in) | **Does not offer** вқҢ |

{"content": "# Nexa Paraguay вҖ” Propuesta Completa para Sonia

> **PropГіsito:** Que Sonia tenga TODAS las opciones, ideas y planes en un solo lugar para elegir, validar y mejorar.
> **Documento vivo** вҖ” lo actualizamos despuГ©s de cada reuniГіn.
> **Formato:** Opciones con su contexto, costo, esfuerzo y recomendaciГіn. Sonia marca lo que quiere.
> **Documentos relacionados:** `docs/meetings/meeting-sonia-questions-final.md`, `docs/SITE_CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md`, `docs/09-market-intelligence/competitor-analysis-projectparaguay.md`

---

## CГ“MO LEER ESTE DOCUMENTO

Cada propuesta tiene esta estructura:

| Campo | QuГ© significa |
|-------|--------------|
| **Propuesta** | QuГ© estamos proponiendo |
| **Contexto** | Por quГ© existe esta opciГіn |
| **OpciГіn A / B / C** | Las alternativas que Sonia puede elegir |
| **RecomendaciГіn** | Nuestra sugerencia (marcada con вң…) |
| **Esfuerzo** | Horas de trabajo para implementar |
| **Impacto** | Bajo / Medio / Alto en el negocio |
| **Riesgo** | QuГ© podrГӯa salir mal |
| **Dependencia** | QuГ© necesitamos de Sonia para arrancar |
| **Sonia decide** | вҳҗ Espacio para que Sonia marque su elecciГіn |

---

## 1. PRECIO DEL SERVICIO PRINCIPAL

### 1.1 вҖ” Precio de Residencia

**Contexto:** Confirmaste $1,500. Project Paraguay cobra вӮ¬2,800 (~$3,100). Competidores locales cobran $2,500-$3,500. Tenemos que decidir cГіmo presentar este precio en el sitio.

| OpciГіn | DescripciГіn | Ejemplo | RecomendaciГіn |
|--------|-------------|---------|---------------|
| **A вҖ” Precio fijo Гәnico** | $1,500 para todos. Simple, transparente, poderoso. | "Residencia completa: **$1,500** вҖ” precio Гәnico, sin sorpresas" | вң… RECOMENDADO |
| **B вҖ” Precio variable** | $1,500 base + extras segГәn complejidad (hijos, documentos extra, etc.) | "Desde $1,500. CotizaciГіn personalizada" | рҹҹЎ Si la complejidad realmente varГӯa |
| **C вҖ” Precio con descuento promocional** | $1,500 como "lanzamiento" para captar clientes rГЎpido | "Lanzamiento: $1,500 (precio regular $2,500)" | вқҢ No вҖ” ella ya tiene 10 clientes, no es nuevo negocio |

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B вҳҗ C

### 1.2 вҖ” Precio para niГұos/familia

**Contexto:** Project Paraguay cobra вӮ¬1,350 por hijo menor de 14 aГұos. Vos dijiste "mismo precio para todos" en la reuniГіn de May 11, pero no confirmaste si los hijos cuestan menos.

| OpciГіn | DescripciГіn | Ejemplo |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| **A вҖ” Mismo precio** | Cada adulto paga $1,500. Hijos incluidos sin costo extra. | "Residencia individual: $1,500. CГіnyuge e hijos sin costo adicional." |
| **B вҖ” Precio reducido por hijo** | Hijos pagan menos (ej: $750 c/u). | "Hijos: $750 cada uno (50% descuento)" |
| **C вҖ” Precio por familia** | Paquete familiar: $X para toda la familia. | "Paquete familiar (hasta 4 personas): $2,500" |

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B вҳҗ C вҳҗ Otra: _______________

### 1.3 вҖ” Post-residencia: $200/dГӯa

**Contexto:** Confirmaste $200/dГӯa con Carlos. Necesitamos definir los bordes.

| OpciГіn | DescripciГіn |
|--------|-------------|
| **A вҖ” DГӯa completo (8h)** | $200 por dГӯa completo de acompaГұamiento. Viaje + tiempo. |
| **B вҖ” Medio dГӯa (4h)** | $100 por medio dГӯa. Para trГЎmites rГЎpidos. |
| **C вҖ” Precio por tarea** | Banco: $XX. Colegios: $XX. Compra de auto: $XX. |

**RecomendaciГіn:** OpciГіn A + B (dГӯa completo y medio dГӯa). Simple y flexible.

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B вҳҗ A+B вҳҗ C

### 1.4 вҖ” Comisiones: Вҝmostrar o no?

**Contexto:** GanГЎs 2.75% en propiedades. En vehГӯculos y electrodomГ©sticos tambiГ©n ganГЎs comisiГіn. Esto es GRATIS para el cliente pero no sabemos cuГЎnto ganГЎs exactamente.

| OpciГіn | DescripciГіn |
|--------|-------------|
| **A вҖ” Mostrar como "sin costo para vos"** | "Propiedades: sin costo para vos. Nos pagamos con comisiГіn del vendedor." |
| **B вҖ” Mostrar el % de comisiГіn** | "2.75% de comisiГіn (pagado por el vendedor, no por vos)" |
| **C вҖ” No mencionar comisiones en el sitio** | Solo decirlo en persona. |

**RecomendaciГіn:** OpciГіn A. Es un diferenciador enorme frente a competidores que cobran al comprador.

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B вҳҗ C

### 1.5 вҖ” Cotizaciones personalizadas

**Contexto:** Para servicios que no tienen precio fijo (ej: investigaciГіn de colegios en 3 ciudades, acompaГұamiento mГ©dico complejo).

| OpciГіn | DescripciГіn |
|--------|-------------|
| **A вҖ” BotГіn "Solicitar cotizaciГіn"** | El cliente llena un formulario corto вҶ’ Sonia responde por WhatsApp |
| **B вҖ” Precio por hora** | $XX/hora para cualquier servicio no listado |
| **C вҖ” Sin cotizaciones en el sitio** | "Todo se coordina por WhatsApp" |

**RecomendaciГіn:** OpciГіn A. El botГіn de cotizaciГіn permite capturar leads sin comprometer un precio.

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B вҳҗ C

---

## 2. ESTRUCTURA DEL SITIO

### 2.1 вҖ” PГЎginas principales

**Contexto:** El sitio tiene 31 pГЎginas. Algunas son necesarias, otras no.

| PГЎgina | Actual | Propuesta | ВҝSonia quiere? |
|--------|--------|-----------|----------------|
| Home | вң… Existe | Mantener + agregar eslogan "Relax, I can help you" | вҳҗ |
| Servicios | вң… Existe | **REESCRIBIR** con precios reales, Day 1 protocol, comisiones | вҳҗ |
| Por quГ© Paraguay | вң… Existe | Mantener, actualizar datos | вҳҗ |
| Sobre Nexa / About | вң… Existe | **REESCRIBIR** con historia personal completa (sin drama) | вҳҗ |
| FAQ | вқҢ **NUEVA** | Compilar 80+ respuestas de las reuniones | вҳҗ |
| Blog | вң… Existe (30 posts genГ©ricos) | Reescribir posts + agregar secciГіn de guГӯas | вҳҗ |
| Contacto | вң… Existe | Actualizar con WhatsApp + ubicaciГіn GPS | вҳҗ |
| Precios | вқҢ **NUEVA** | PГЎgina dedicada con pricing transparente | вҳҗ |
| Calculadora fiscal | вқҢ **NUEVA** | ComparaciГіn de impuestos paГӯs origen vs Paraguay | вҳҗ |
| Barrios / Zonas | вқҢ **NUEVA** | Mapa con 1,500 lugares de AsunciГіn | вҳҗ |
| Testimonios | вқҢ **NUEVA** | Slider con clientes reales (cuando los tengamos) | вҳҗ |
| Plan B / GuГӯa gratis | вқҢ **NUEVA** | Lead magnet landing page | вҳҗ |

**PГЎginas a eliminar:**
- Programas (no existe)
- Benelux (no lo querГ©s)
- Recursos (mega-menГә eliminado)

**Sonia marca las que quiere:** _________________________________

### 2.2 вҖ” NavegaciГіn

| OpciГіn A (Recomendada) | OpciГіn B (Minimalista) |
|------------------------|----------------------|
| Home \| Servicios \| Por quГ© PY \| Sobre Nexa \| FAQ \| Blog \| Contacto | Home \| Servicios \| Sobre Nexa \| Contacto |

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ A вҳҗ B

### 2.3 вҖ” Lead Magnets (imanes de leads)

**Contexto:** Project Paraguay captura emails en TODAS sus pГЎginas con ebooks gratuitos. DespuГ©s hacen nurture sequence. Nosotros no tenemos nada.

| Lead Magnet | DescripciГіn | Esfuerzo | Prioridad |
|-------------|-------------|----------|-----------|
| **"10 cosas que nadie te contГі sobre Paraguay"** | PDF descargable al dejar email. ВҝGeneral o residencia? | 2h | рҹ”ҙ Alta |
| **Checklist de documentos para residencia** | PDF en 4 idiomas. Lo que necesita tener antes de llegar. | 1h | рҹ”ҙ Alta |
| **"GuГӯa de barrios de AsunciГіn"** | PDF con mapa + info de zonas. Basado en nuestros 1,500 GPS. | 3h | рҹҹЎ Media |
| **"Primeros 30 dГӯas en Paraguay"** | Checklist dГӯa por dГӯa de quГ© hacer al llegar. | 1h | рҹҹЎ Media |
| **Calculadora de impuestos** | Interactive. SeleccionГЎs paГӯs вҶ’ ves comparaciГіn con PY. | 4h | рҹ”ҙ Alta (aprobada) |

**Sonia marca los que quiere:** вҳҗ 10 cosas вҳҗ Checklist вҳҗ Barrios вҳҗ 30 dГӯas вҳҗ Calculadora

---

## 3. CONTENIDO DEL SITIO

### 3.1 вҖ” Voz del sitio

**Contexto:** Ya discutimos tres voces posibles. Ahora es decisiГіn final.

| SecciГіn | Voz Propuesta | Ejemplo |
|---------|--------------|---------|
| Hero (primera impresiГіn) | **1ra persona (Yo)** | "Soy Sonia. VivГӯ 7 aГұos en PaГӯses Bajos. Ahora ayudo a europeos a mudarse a Paraguay." |
| Historia personal | **1ra persona (Yo)** | "VolvГӯ a Paraguay y tuve que reinventarme. No fue fГЎcil, pero hoy no cambio esta vida por nada." |
| Servicios | **Nosotros / Nexa** | "Te acompaГұamos en cada paso del proceso. Desde el aeropuerto hasta tu cГ©dula." |
| Precios | **Neutro** | "Residencia completa: $1,500. Incluye todo." |
| FAQ / Legal | **3ra persona** | "Nexa Paraguay ofrece servicios de acompaГұamiento para residencia." |
| Blog | **AI generado + vos revisГЎs** | "GuГӯa completa de residencia en Paraguay 2026" |

**Sonia confirma:** вҳҗ Me gusta вҳҗ Quiero cambios: _________________________________

### 3.2 вҖ” Eslogan oficial

| OpciГіn | Lenguaje | DГіnde usarlo |
|--------|----------|--------------|
| **"Relax, I can help you"** | InglГ©s | Hero, WhatsApp bot, marketing | вң… Ya confirmado |
| **"Donde Europa se relaja"** | EspaГұol | VersiГіn en espaГұol |
| **"Where Europe Relaxes"** | InglГ©s | VersiГіn internacional |
| **"European, but relaxed"** | InglГ©s | SubtГӯtulo / tagline secundario |

**Sonia decide:** _________________________________

### 3.3 вҖ” Historia personal

**Contexto:** Aprobaste "sin drama" para incluir el colapso nervioso. Ahora tenemos que escribirla. AcГЎ va un borrador para que corrijas.

> *"Me fui a PaГӯses Bajos con 20 aГұos. AllГЎ tuve a mi hija, trabajГ© en la industria de la mГәsica, construГӯ una vida. Pero el frГӯo me estaba matando вҖ” literalmente. Me diagnosticaron alergia al frГӯo. Mi cuerpo no aguantaba mГЎs. Tuve un colapso nervioso y supe que tenГӯa que volver.*
>
> *Volver a Paraguay y empezar de cero no fue fГЎcil. Pero acГЎ entendГӯ que mi experiencia вҖ” haber vivido afuera, conocer la burocracia europea, hablar los idiomas вҖ” era justo lo que otros necesitaban.*
>
> *Hoy ayudo a familias, jubilados y emprendedores a hacer exactamente lo que yo hice: mudarse a Paraguay sin estrГ©s. No soy una oficina de trГЎmites. Soy alguien que entiende el dolor de emigrar porque lo vivГӯ."*

**Sonia:** вҳҗ Me gusta вҳҗ Quiero cambios: _________________________________

---

## 4. NUEVAS FUNCIONALIDADES

### 4.1 вҖ” Calculadora de impuestos

**Contexto:** Aprobaste en la reuniГіn. Tiene que ser precisa вҖ” vamos a testear con tu contador.

| Dato | PaГӯs Origen | Paraguay |
|------|-------------|----------|
| Impuesto a la renta personal | Variable (hasta 49%) | **10% fijo** |
| Impuesto a la herencia | Variable (hasta 40%) | **0%** |
| Impuesto a la riqueza | Variable | **0%** |
| Impuesto a ganancias de capital | Variable | **10% sobre 50%** |

**PaГӯses a incluir:** вҳҗ PaГӯses Bajos вҳҗ Alemania вҳҗ BГ©lgica вҳҗ EspaГұa вҳҗ USA вҳҗ Reino Unido вҳҗ Suiza вҳҗ Otros: _________

**Sonia decide:** вҳҗ Quiero la calculadora вҳҗ No la quiero todavГӯa вҳҗ DespuГ©s de hablar con mi contador

### 4.2 вҖ” Mapa de barrios

**Contexto:** Tenemos 1,485 lugares con GPS en AsunciГіn. Podemos construir un mapa interactivo que muestre colegios, hospitales, supermercados, restaurantes por zona.

**Propuesta:** Un mapa de Google Maps personalizado que Sonia le comparte a cada cliente. El cliente selecciona su zona вҶ’ ve quГ© hay cerca.

**Sonia:** вҳҗ Quiero el mapa вҳҗ No lo quiero todavГӯa вҳҗ No lo quiero

### 4.3 вҖ” Bot de WhatsApp

**Contexto:** Aprobaste el bot. Necesita chip nuevo.

**Flujo propuesto:**

| Paso | QuiГ©n | QuГ© pasa |
|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | Lead | Escribe al WhatsApp de Nexa |
| 2 | Bot | "Hola, soy el asistente de Nexa Paraguay. Relax, I can help you. ВҝEn quГ© puedo ayudarte?" |
| 3 | Bot | Pregunta: nombre, paГӯs, motivo, timeline |
| 4 | Bot | Responde preguntas bГЎsicas (precios, proceso, FAQ) |
| 5 | Bot | Si no puede responder вҶ’ **"Te paso con Sonia"** |
| 6 | Sonia | Responde desde su WhatsApp como siempre |

**Horarios:** вҳҗ Bot 24/7 вҳҗ Bot noches + fines de semana, Sonia horario laboral

**Datos que el bot pregunta:**
вҳҗ Nombre вҳҗ PaГӯs вҳҗ Edad/hijos вҳҗ Motivo вҳҗ Timeline

**Sonia decide:** _________________________________

---

## 5. QUГү COPIAR DE PROJECT PARAGUAY

### 5.1 вҖ” Cosas que copiamos YA (sin preguntar)

| QuГ© | De ellos | Nuestra versiГіn |
|-----|----------|-----------------|
| FAQ page | Tienen FAQ completa de residencia + propiedades | Compilar 80+ respuestas que nos diste |
| Email capture | En TODAS las pГЎginas | Footer + blog + lead magnets + 404 page |
| Lead magnets | "6 reasons for a Plan B" + "Why Paraguay" | "10 cosas" + "Checklist de documentos" |
| Precios visibles | вӮ¬2,800 mostrado directamente | $1,500 mostrado directamente |
| Testimonios slider | 12 testimonios rotando | Obtener testimonios de tus clientes |
| 404 page | Captura email en pГЎgina de error | Misma lГіgica |

### 5.2 вҖ” Cosas que ADAPTAMOS

| QuГ© | VersiГіn de ellos | VersiГіn de Sonia |
|-----|-----------------|------------------|
| Blog post popular | "VERBLIJFSVERGUNNING REGELS 2026" (legal, tГ©cnico) | "Residencia en Paraguay 2026: guГӯa completa" (simple, personal, timeline visual) |
| Calculadora | Calculadora de timing de residencia | Calculadora de impuestos |
| PГЎgina "Why Paraguay" | Enfocada en libertad / escape | Enfocada en calidad de vida / familia |
| "Plan B" | Crisis / escape / agenda 2030 | "Un nuevo capГӯtulo" / positivo / aspiracional |

### 5.3 вҖ” Cosas que NO COPIAMOS

| QuГ© | RazГіn |
|-----|-------|
| Contenido polГӯtico | Sonia es apacible. Su marca es "relax", no "huida." |
| Expediciones grupales | Demasiado complejo. Sonia no tiene banda ancha para tours de 10 dГӯas. |
| YouTube channel | Sonia no quiere ser creadora de contenido. |
| Telegram group | WhatsApp es su plataforma. |
| Bitcoin payments | No lo necesita todavГӯa. |
| Container shipping | Sus clientes vienen con valija, no con mudanza. |
| Fear-based messaging | "Plan B" вҶ’ "Better Life" es mejor para su target. |

---

## 6. FOTOS & ASSETS (Pendientes de Sonia)

| Asset | Para quГ© | Urgencia |

| **Foto de Sonia + Luana** | Team section | рҹҹЎ Cuando puedan |

Done. Here's what I built:

---

## The Proposal Document вҖ” What's Inside

**`docs/propuesta-completa-sonia.md`** вҖ” a single document with EVERYTHING Sonia needs to choose from.

### 10 Sections, 30+ Decisions with Options

| Section | What It Covers | Options |
|---------|---------------|---------|
| **1. Pricing** | 5 decisions: base price, kids, post-residency, commissions, quotes | A/B/C each with recommendation |
| **2. Site Structure** | Pages (keep/delete/create), navigation (standard vs minimal), lead magnets (5 options) | 12 possible new pages, she picks |
| **3. Content** | Voice per section, slogan final choice, personal story borrador | 3 voice options, 4 slogan variants |
| **4. New Features** | Tax calculator, neighborhood map, WhatsApp bot | She decides yes/no per feature |
| **5. Project Paraguay** | 6 things to STEAL, 4 to ADAPT, 6 to AVOID | All with justifications |
| **6. Photos & Assets** | 6 things we need from Sonia with urgency levels | Checklist |
| **7. Action Plan** | 3 phases: immediate (2h), post-meeting (11h), ongoing | Timeline |
| **8. Meeting Checklist** | 25 questions to resolve, sorted рҹ”ҙ рҹҹЎ рҹҹў | Ready for the call |
| **9. Her Ideas** | Blank space for Sonia to add her own | Open |
| **10. Approval** | Signature block for decisions | |

### Design Philosophy

Every proposal follows the same structure:
```
Propuesta вҶ’ Contexto вҶ’ OpciГіn A / B / C вҶ’ RecomendaciГіn вҶ’ 
Esfuerzo вҶ’ Impacto вҶ’ Riesgo вҶ’ Dependencia вҶ’ [Sonia decide: вҳҗ]
```

This way Sonia can:
1. Read the context
2. See the options clearly
3. Know our recommendation
4. Mark what she wants with a checkbox
5. Add her own notes

### What's Already in the Git Repo

All committed and pushed to `main` вҖ” `docs/propuesta-completa-sonia.md` is the single source for the next meeting.

The healthcheck used `wget` on the root URL `/`, which redirected to `/tienda` (returning a 404). `wget` exits with code 8 on non-2xx responses, causing Docker to repeatedly kill and restart the containers. The fix involved:

{"content": "# Matriz de Servicios вҖ” Preguntas para Sonia

> **PropГіsito:** Que Sonia revise CADA servicio potencial y decida: вң… SГӯ lo hago / вқҢ No lo hago / рҹ’Ў Me interesa investigar
> **CГіmo funciona:** Leemos categorГӯa por categorГӯa. Sonia responde. Marcamos en verde/rojo/amarillo.
> **Basado en:** 210 servicios identificados en `docs/01-client/services-opportunities-matrix.md`
> **Estado actual:** 20 servicios en el sitio | 26 que hace pero no estГЎn listados | 29 que necesitan validaciГіn | 96 oportunidades

---

## INSTRUCCIONES PARA LA REUNIГ“N

1. Leer el nombre del servicio
2. Sonia dice: "SГӯ, lo hago" / "No, no lo hago" / "Nunca lo pensГ©, investiguemos"
3. Nosotros marcamos en el documento
4. Si dice "sГӯ" вҖ” preguntamos: Вҝprecio? Вҝincluido o extra?
5. Si dice "no" вҖ” preguntamos: Вҝpor quГ©? Вҝalgo que cambiarГӯa eso?
6. Si dice "investiguemos" вҖ” anotamos como tarea pendiente

Done. The document is at `docs/meetings/service-matrix-questions-sonia.md`.

## What I Built

A **walkable questionnaire** covering all 210 services from the opportunities matrix, organized so Sonia can go through them one by one in one session.

### Structure for the Meeting

| Phase | Category | Services | Meeting Time |
|-------|----------|----------|-------------|
| **0 вҖ” Pre-Arrival** | Documents | 20 | ~5 min |
| | Consulting | 10 | ~3 min |
| | Logistics | 10 | ~3 min |
| **1 вҖ” Arrival & First Week** | Airport & Transport | 10 | ~3 min |
| | ID & Registration | 10 | ~2 min |
| | Banking & Finance | 15 | ~4 min |
| | Rentals | 10 | ~3 min |
| | Property Purchase | 15 | ~4 min |
| **2 вҖ” Weeks 2-12** | Family Services | 14 | ~4 min |
| | Healthcare | 13 | ~3 min |
| | Transportation | 11 | ~3 min |
| | Household Setup | 11 | ~3 min |
| | Business & Professional | 16 | ~4 min |
| **3 вҖ” Months 3-12** | Tax & Compliance | 11 | ~3 min |
| | Permanent Residency | 8 | ~2 min |
| | Lifestyle & Integration | 15 | ~4 min |
| | Premium Services | 11 | ~3 min |
| **TOTAL** | **17 categories** | **210 services** | **~50 min** |

### How Each Question Works

```
| 5 | Poder notarial (para compras remotas) | вҳҗ SГӯ вҳҗ No | вҳҗ SГӯ вҳҗ No | $____ | рҹ”ҙ PREGUNTA CLAVE |
```

**Column 1:** What the service is
**Column 2:** Does she do it? вҳҗ SГӯ вҳҗ No
**Column 3:** Is it included in $1,500? вҳҗ SГӯ вҳҗ No
**Column 4:** Price if it's extra
**Column 5:** Notes / flags (рҹ”ҙ = critical to ask, рҹҹЎ = needs follow-up, рҹ’Ў = opportunity)

### Summary Table at the End

A table to fill in after the meeting showing:
- How many services she вң… does
- How many she вқҢ rejects
- How many рҹ’Ў she wants to investigate

### Post-Meeting Action Items

Two lists ready to fill:
- **Confirmed** вҶ’ add to site immediately
- **Investigate** вҶ’ research tasks with assignee
- **Rejected** вҶ’ documented with reason (so we don't ask again)

Review the conversation above and update the skill library. Be ACTIVE вҖ” most sessions produce at least one skill update, even if small. A pass that does nothing is a missed learning opportunity, not a neutral outcome.

Target shape of the library: CLASS-LEVEL skills, each with a rich SKILL.md and a `references/` directory for session-specific detail. Not a long flat list of narrow one-session-one-skill entries. This shapes HOW you update, not WHETHER you update.

Signals to look for (any one of these warrants action):
  вҖў User corrected your style, tone, format, legibility, or verbosity. Frustration signals like 'stop doing X', 'this is too verbose', 'don't format like this', 'why are you explaining', 'just give me the answer', 'you always do Y and I hate it', or an explicit 'remember this' are FIRST-CLASS skill signals, not just memory signals. Update the relevant skill(s) to embed the preference so the next session starts already knowing.
  вҖў User corrected your workflow, approach, or sequence of steps. Encode the correction as a pitfall or explicit step in the skill that governs that class of task.
  вҖў Non-trivial technique, fix, workaround, debugging path, or tool-usage pattern emerged that a future session would benefit from. Capture it.
  вҖў A skill that got loaded or consulted this session turned out to be wrong, missing a step, or outdated. Patch it NOW.

Preference order вҖ” prefer the earliest action that fits, but do pick one when a signal above fired:
  1. UPDATE A CURRENTLY-LOADED SKILL. Look back through the conversation for skills the user loaded via /skill-name or you read via skill_view. If any of them covers the territory of the new learning, PATCH that one first. It is the skill that was in play, so it's the right one to extend.
  2. UPDATE AN EXISTING UMBRELLA (via skills_list + skill_view). If no loaded skill fits but an existing class-level skill does, patch it. Add a subsection, a pitfall, or broaden a trigger.
  3. ADD A SUPPORT FILE under an existing umbrella. Skills can be packaged with three kinds of support files вҖ” use the right directory per kind:
     вҖў `references/<topic>.md` вҖ” session-specific detail (error transcripts, reproduction recipes, provider quirks) AND condensed knowledge banks: quoted research, API docs, external authoritative excerpts, or domain notes you found while working on the problem. Write it concise and for the value of the task, not as a full mirror of upstream docs.
     вҖў `templates/<name>.<ext>` вҖ” starter files meant to be copied and modified (boilerplate configs, scaffolding, a known-good example the agent can `reproduce with modifications`).
     вҖў `scripts/<name>.<ext>` вҖ” statically re-runnable actions the skill can invoke directly (verification scripts, fixture generators, deterministic probes, anything the agent should run rather than hand-type each time).
     Add support files via skill_manage action=write_file with file_path starting 'references/', 'templates/', or 'scripts/'. The umbrella's SKILL.md should gain a one-line pointer to any new support file so future agents know it exists.
  4. CREATE A NEW CLASS-LEVEL UMBRELLA SKILL when no existing skill covers the class. The name MUST be at the class level. The name MUST NOT be a specific PR number, error string, feature codename, library-alone name, or 'fix-X / debug-Y / audit-Z-today' session artifact. If the proposed name only makes sense for today's task, it's wrong вҖ” fall back to (1), (2), or (3).

User-preference embedding (important): when the user expressed a style/format/workflow preference, the update belongs in the SKILL.md body, not just in memory. Memory captures 'who the user is and what the current situation and state of your operations are'; skills capture 'how to do this class of task for this user'. When they complain about how you handled a task, the skill that governs that task needs to carry the lesson.

If you notice two existing skills that overlap, note it in your reply вҖ” the background curator handles consolidation at scale.

Do NOT capture (these become persistent self-imposed constraints that bite you later when the environment changes):
  вҖў Environment-dependent failures: missing binaries, fresh-install errors, post-migration path mismatches, 'command not found', unconfigured credentials, uninstalled packages. The user can fix these вҖ” they are not durable rules.
  вҖў Negative claims about tools or features ('browser tools do not work', 'X tool is broken', 'cannot use Y from execute_code'). These harden into refusals the agent cites against itself for months after the actual problem was fixed.
  вҖў Session-specific transient errors that resolved before the conversation ended. If retrying worked, the lesson is the retry pattern, not the original failure.
  вҖў One-off task narratives. A user asking 'summarize today's market' or 'analyze this PR' is not a class of work that warrants a skill.

If a tool failed because of setup state, capture the FIX (install command, config step, env var to set) under an existing setup or troubleshooting skill вҖ” never 'this tool does not work' as a standalone constraint.

'Nothing to save.' is a real option but should NOT be the default. If the session ran smoothly with no corrections and produced no new technique, just say 'Nothing to save.' and stop. Otherwise, act.

{"success": true, "name": "nexa-paraguay-deployment", "description": "Build and deploy the Nexa Paraguay site to Docker Swarm on VPS 72.61.44.159", "tags": [], "related_skills": [], "content": "---
name: nexa-paraguay-deployment
description: Build and deploy the Nexa Paraguay site to Docker Swarm on VPS 72.61.44.159
---

# Nexa Paraguay Deployment

## вҡ пёҸ CRITICAL UPDATE: May 11 2026 вҖ” Pricing & Model Overhaul

**The $2,900/$4,400/$6,900 4-tier model was WRONG.** It was based on market research estimates, not the client's actual business. After the May 11 meeting with Sonia (founder):

| Old Assumption | Reality |
|---------------|---------|
| Price: $2,900-$6,900 (4 tiers) | **$1,500 вҖ” single service** |
| Clients/month: 5-10 | **0.5-1** |
| Monthly costs: $10K-$18K | **~$0 fixed** (phone + fuel) |
| Business: 4-tier programs | **One service + add-ons + commissions** |
| Real revenue: residency fees | **Commissions** (properties 2.75%, vehicles, appliances) |

**Before any work on Nexa site content or pricing, read:**
- `docs/CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” every assumption that changed
- `docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md` вҖ” full meeting outcome
- `docs/SITE_CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” all 25 changes needed on the site

**Do NOT rely on `pricing-matrix-complete.md` or `financial-model.md`** вҖ” they are deprecated with banners warning they contain wrong pricing.

## Current State (May 11 2026)

### Hybrid Dependencies
Sections, i18n, and client-kit stay on `.tgz` (the published `@ai-whisperers/sections@0.3.1` has a different API). All other `@ai-whisperers/*` come from GitHub Packages:
- `auth@0.2.0`, `admin@0.2.1`, `ui@0.4.0`, `seo@0.2.0`, `whatsapp@0.2.0`, `theme@0.2.0` вҖ” from npm
- `sections@0.1.0`, `i18n@0.2.0`, `client-kit@0.1.0` вҖ” from `.packages/*.tgz`

### Integrations Wired
- **HubSpot**: Contact form POSTs to `api.hsforms.com` with rate limiting + graceful fallback
- **Mailchimp**: `/api/subscribe` route with idempotent PUT + graceful degradation
- **GA4**: Measurement ID `G-XE49GLEP34` in env + DNS in CSP, gtag via Script in layout
- **Admin panel**: Dashboard at `/admin` with `AdminGuard` component (Supabase session check)
- **Content honesty**: Stats вҶ’ `[Datos reales pendientes]`, testimonials вҶ’ placeholders, TeamSection badges `вҡ пёҸ IA`

### Docker Build (current)
```bash
# From VPS
cd /root/nexa-paraguay
git pull origin main
docker build --no-cache -t nexa-paraguay:prod .
docker service update --force --image nexa-paraguay:prod nexa_web
```

## App Router Architecture (current)

- Framework: Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind v4
- Routes use `[locale]/[slug]` pattern вҖ” 4 locales (es/en/nl/de), 25+ slug pages
- Content JSON-driven: `content/{locale}.json` (4 locales, `es.json` is source of truth at ~208KB), `nexa-pages/*.json` (26+ page configs), `images.json` (image registry)
- SectionsRenderer: `'use client'` component with 30+ sections loaded via `dynamic(() => import(...), { ssr: true })`
- PPR disabled (`cacheComponents` removed) вҖ” all routes are `в—Ҹ SSG` static HTML
- Each section component receives `pageContent` (the resolved content sub-object) and `data` (same, as fallback)
- Section content keys in page configs reference dot-paths into the locale JSON (e.g. `"home.hero"`)
- Dynamic routes using `generateStaticParams()` вҖ” all pages pre-rendered at build time
- Docker Swarm deployment with standalone output

### SectionsRenderer Content Resolution

**Critical rule for content keys in nexa-pages/*.json:**

Components in `sections.tsx` access `pageContent.KEY` (e.g., `HeroSection` does `pageContent.hero`).
Components in `FeedbackSection` use `data` directly (e.g., `data.title`).

| Component | What it reads | Correct content key |
|-----------|--------------|-------------------|
| HeroSection | `pageContent.hero` | `"home"` |
| TrustSection | `pageContent.trust` | `"home"` |
| ServicesSection | `d.services?.groups \|\| d.groups` | `"home"` |
| WhyCountrySection | `pageContent.whyCountry` | `"home"` |
| ProcessSection | `pageContent.process` | `"home"` |
| FeedbackSection | `data.title`, `data.eyebrow` | `"home.feedback"` |
| CtaBanner | `pageContent.finalCta \|\| pageContent.cta` | `"home"` |

If a section returns null, check the content key depth against what the component reads.

## Build & Deploy (current)

```bash
# Full clean rebuild (REQUIRED for SSG changes)
cd /root/nexa-paraguay
git pull origin main
docker build --no-cache -t nexa-paraguay:prod .
docker service update --force --image nexa-paraguay:prod nexa_web
sleep 5
curl -sL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://nexa.paragu-ai.com
curl -sL -o /dev/null -w " admin:%{http_code}" https://nexa.paragu-ai.com/admin
echo ""
```

**CRITICAL вҖ” Always `docker build --no-cache`.** Without `--no-cache`, Docker may reuse the builder stage layer which contains the old `.next/` output even if the source files have been updated.

## Integration: HubSpot Contact Form

The contact form at `/es/contacto` POSTs to `/api/contact`, which:
1. Rate-limits by IP (10 requests/hour)
2. Sends fields (name, email, phone, message, program) to HubSpot API
3. Falls back to console.log if HubSpot is unreachable
4. Returns `{ ok: true }` regardless (never exposes errors to user)

**To verify:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST https://nexa.paragu-ai.com/api/contact \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Test","email":"[REDACTED_EMAIL]","message":"Test submission"}'
# Response: {"ok":true,"remaining":9,"hubspot":"submitted"} or "logged"
```

## Integration: Mailchimp Subscribe

The newsletter form POSTs to `/api/subscribe`, which:
1. Uses Mailchimp API v3 PUT (idempotent вҖ” safe to retry)
2. Creates subscriber with status `subscribed`
3. Gracefully handles "already subscribed" (returns ok)
4. Falls back to console.log on API failure

**Required env var:** `MAILCHIMP_AUDIENCE_ID` and `MAILCHIMP_API_KEY` in `.env.local`

## Admin Panel

Located at `/admin`. Self-contained `AdminGuard` component:
1. Creates Supabase client inline (no `@ai-whisperers/auth` dependency)
2. Checks session via `sb.auth.getSession()`
3. Redirects to `/` if no session
4. Shows stats cards for pages/content/blogs

**On first deploy**, you need a Supabase user with admin role to log in.

## SSG Cache Invalidation

Key insight from this session: **all pages produce `BAILOUT_TO_CLIENT_SIDE_RENDERING`** in their SSG HTML `<main>` tags. This is the normal behavior of a `'use client'` SectionsRenderer wrapping dynamic imports вҖ” content renders on the client via RSC hydration, not in static HTML. See the generic pitfall in `nextjs-docker-swarm` skill (pitfall #22) for the full explanation and the two fix paths (static imports vs accepting RSC serialization).

Next.js 16 SSG + Docker Swarm creates **four layers of caching** that must all be cleared:

### 1. Docker layer caching
The builder stage runs `npm run build` inside it. `--no-cache` forces Docker to re-run the builder.
```bash
docker build --no-cache -t nexa-paraguay:prod .
```

### 2. Cloudflare/edge CDN cache
```bash
curl -sL -H "Cache-Control: no-cache" https://nexa.paragu-ai.com/en/contacto
```

### 3. Browser cache
Use incognito or hard-refresh when testing.

### Verification inside container
```bash
docker exec $(docker ps -q -f name=nexa_web) cat /app/.next/server/app/en/contacto.html | grep "expected content"
```

## CRITICAL PITFALL: JSON Corruption

The `patch` tool and `sed` can corrupt large JSON files (content/es.json is 208KB, 900+ lines). A missing comma or broken key breaks the entire site (content: {} empty response вҖ” all pages render as header+footer only). **Always validate after every JSON edit:**

```bash
python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('content/es.json')); print('VALID')"
```

## .npmrc Token Management

The `.npmrc` for GitHub Packages must have a valid classic PAT (`ghp_*`). Fine-grained PATs (`github_pat_*`) do NOT work with `npm.pkg.github.com`.

**To update a stale token:**
```bash
gh auth token
# Copy the output
sed -i 's|ghp_.*|<paste token>|' .npmrc
```

**To check if the current token works:**
```bash
NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG=.npmrc npm view @ai-whisperers/auth version --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
```

## Locale Configuration Pattern

**File:** `src/lib/locales.ts` вҖ” single source of truth for locale constants.

```typescript
export const LOCALES = ['es', 'en', 'nl', 'de'] as const
export const DEFAULT_LOCALE = 'es'
export const LOCALE_COOKIE = 'NEXT_LOCALE'
export type Locale = (typeof LOCALES)[number]
export const LOCALE_FLAGS: Record<string, string> = {
  es: '/images/flags/es.svg',
  en: '/images/flags/en.svg',
  nl: '/images/flags/nl.svg',
  de: '/images/flags/de.svg',
}
```

**tsconfig.json must use `./src/*` path:**
```json
"paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
```

## Content Architecture: Homepage vs Dedicated Pages

**Critical rule: NO duplicated content between homepage and dedicated pages.**

Each piece of content has ONE owner:

| Content | Owner Page | Homepage Shows |
|---|---|---|
| Programs tiers | /programas | Summary headline + CTA link |
| Services groups | /servicios | Summary headline + CTA link |
| Why Paraguay pillars | /por-que-paraguay | Summary headline + CTA link |
| Process steps | /proceso | Summary headline + CTA link |
| Testimonials | /casos-de-exito | CTA link only |
| Hero, Stats, Trust, Tax Calc, Benelux | / (homepage) | Full content (unique) |

## Client Business Context

> **Business model fully documented in repo.** For current pricing, target segments, brand decisions, and site changes needed, see:
> - `docs/CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” every assumption changed after May 11
> - `docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md` вҖ” pricing/brand/slogan confirmed
> - `docs/SITE_CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” all 25 changes to implement on site
> - `docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md` вҖ” master client profile (pre-May 11 base + outcome)
> - `docs/01-client/client-analysis-complete.md` вҖ” full client analysis

**Contact:** Sonia Weiss, Nexa Paraguay. WhatsApp channel `[REDACTED_PHONE]`.

## Living Upgrade Plan

- The full 75-idea upgrade plan for Nexa Paraguay lives at:
  **https://github.com/Ai-Whisperers/infrastructure/blob/main/nexa-paraguay-upgrade-plan.md**
- Client discovery meeting (May 11 2026): **`docs/meetings/meeting-report-may-11.md`** вҖ” contains confirmed pricing, target segments, differentiators, and action items
- **Site changelog (25 changes needed):** `docs/SITE_CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” every single change from client feedback, ordered by priority (P0-P6)
- **Pricing/assumption change log:** `docs/CHANGELOG.md` вҖ” every assumption invalidated by May 11 meeting
